title: Non-Relativistic Spin-Orbit Interaction in Triplet Superconductors: Edelstein Effect and Spin Pumping by Electric Fields
summary: Non-relativistic momentum-dependent spin splitting, as observed in collinear altermagnets and non-collinear $p$-wave magnets, provides exciting avenues for controlling spin dynamics. Here, we reveal a distinct form of non-relativistic ``spin-orbit coupling" in triplet superconductors by demonstrating that the triplet order parameter induces a wave-vector-dependent spin texture of Bogoliubov quasiparticles, thereby entangling their orbital and spin motions. Even in the absence of relativistic spin-orbit coupling, this intertwining of spin and orbital motion allows an electric field to generate spin polarization in a $p$-wave superconductor -- that is, an Edelstein effect. Building on this mechanism, we propose an efficient scheme for the nonlinear generation of a DC spin current via electric near fields, driven by AC spin polarization and electron velocity. This general principle offers a powerful route for generating and manipulating spin currents in unconventional superconductors.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了三重态超导体中一种全新的非相对论性“自旋-轨道耦合”机制：三重态序参量会在Bogoliubov准粒子中诱导出波矢依赖的自旋织构，从而在没有相对论自旋轨道耦合的情况下实现电场驱动的自旋极化（Edelstein效应），并进一步提出利用近场电场非线性产生直流自旋电流的方案。
AI.motivation: 在共线交变磁体和非共线p波磁体中已观察到非相对论性动量依赖的自旋分裂，这为控制自旋动力学提供了新途径。作者希望探索三重态超导体中是否存在类似的自旋-轨道纠缠机制，并利用其实现自旋电流的产生与操控。
AI.method: 通过理论分析证明三重态超导序参量在Bogoliubov准粒子中产生波矢依赖的自旋织构，实现轨道和自旋运动的纠缠；基于此机制推导出Edelstein效应，并设计了利用交流自旋极化和电子速度通过近场电场非线性产生直流自旋电流的方案。
AI.result: 在无相对论自旋轨道耦合的p波超导体中，电场仍能产生自旋极化（Edelstein效应）；提出了通过交流近场电场非线性产生直流自旋电流的高效方案。
AI.conclusion: 该原理为非常规超导体中自旋电流的产生与操控提供了全新且有效的途径。

title: Observation of flat-bottom U-shaped energy gap in high-Tc nickelate (La,Pr)3Ni2O7 thin films
summary: The discovery of high transition temperature (high-Tc) superconductivity in Ruddlesden-Popper (R-P) bilayer nickelates under high pressure has stimulated extensive work to understand the underlying mechanism and search for superconductors with higher Tc. The recent realization of superconductivity in R-P bilayer nickelate thin films with onset Tc above 40 K at ambient-pressure enables the use of a wide array of powerful experimental tools to investigate the unconventional high-Tc superconductivity in bilayer nickelates. Here, using ultra-low temperature scanning tunneling microscopy/spectroscopy (STM/S) and electrical transport study, we report the first successful observation of an energy-symmetric, flat-bottom U-shaped gap with zero residual density of states around the Fermi level in the high-Tc nickelate (La,Pr)3Ni2O7 thin film grown on SrLaAlO4 substrate. Before and after STM/S studies, transport measurements on the same sample reveal consistent superconducting behaviors showing zero resistance, with an onset Tc above 40 K and zero resistance Tc above 20 K. The tunneling spectra exhibit highly unconventional temperature evolution, characterized by a rapid filling of the U-shaped energy gap to a V-shaped gap as the temperature increases. Furthermore, the U-shaped energy gap is reduced under a c-axis magnetic field of 14 T. The energy-symmetric U-shaped gap, taken together with its dependence on magnetic field and temperature, is consistent with the behavior of a superconducting gap, suggesting a nodeless gap function at ultra-low temperatures. Our findings shed new lights on the nature of high-Tc superconductivity and provide an encouraging and thought-provoking hint for a local superconductivity with Tc above liquid nitrogen boiling temperature in nickelate superconductors at ambient or zero pressure.

AI.tldr: 本文利用超低温扫描隧道显微镜/谱学(STM/S)和电输运测量，首次在(La,Pr)₃Ni₂O₇薄膜中观测到费米能级附近能量对称、平底U形超导能隙（零剩余态密度），该能隙随温度升高迅速填充为V形，在14T磁场下减小，表明无节点能隙函数，为理解镍基高温超导机制提供了新证据，并提示常压/零压下可能存在液氮温度以上的局域超导性。
AI.motivation: 高压下Ruddlesden-Popper双镍层镍酸盐中发现高温超导，但机理尚不明确；近期常压下薄膜超导的实现（起始Tc>40K）为实验研究提供了契机，亟需直接探测超导能隙结构以理解其非常规高温超导机制。
AI.method: 采用超低温扫描隧道显微镜/谱学(STM/S)结合电输运测量，在SrLaAlO₄衬底上生长的(La,Pr)₃Ni₂O₇薄膜中进行原位、同一样品的超导能隙表征与超导行为验证。
AI.result: 成功观测到能量对称、平底U形超导能隙（零剩余态密度）；同一样品输运测量显示起始Tc>40K、零电阻Tc>20K；能隙随温度升高快速从U形演变为V形；14T磁场下U形能隙减小。
AI.conclusion: U形能隙及其对磁场和温度的依赖符合超导能隙行为，表明超低温下存在无节点能隙函数；该发现为镍基高温超导机理提供了关键实验约束，并暗示常压/零压下可能存在液氮温度以上的局域超导性。

title: Equidistant resonance jumps in superconducting coplanar resonators driven by Abrikosov vortices
summary: Superconducting coplanar resonators are key building blocks of cryogenic microwave circuits, yet their performance in perpendicular magnetic fields is ultimately limited by Abrikosov vortices. In this work we investigate the dependence of the transmission parameter $S_{21}$ of niobium quarter-wave coplanar resonators on perpendicular magnetic fields up to 40 Oe and at temperatures between 18 mK and 5 K. Beyond the reversible Meissner regime, the entire resonance peak exhibits abrupt, staircase-like jumps as a function of magnetic field. Upon reversal of the field sweep, these jumps form an almost equidistant series with spacing 1.7-1.8 Oe, which, in agreement with theoretical estimates, we interpret as signatures of multiple-vortex entry and exit events. Additionally, we observe the non-proportional responses of the resonant frequency and the internal quality factor that indicate a complex contribution of vortex and antivortex configurations. We believe that our results will stimulate further studies of large vortex-antivortex systems, explicitly accounting for their discrete nature.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了超导铌共面谐振器在垂直磁场（最高40 Oe）和超低温（18 mK-5 K）下的传输参数S21行为。发现磁场超过可逆迈斯纳区后，谐振峰出现阶梯状跳跃，场反转时跳跃间隔约1.7-1.8 Oe，对应多涡旋进入和退出事件。同时观察到谐振频率和内部品质因子的非比例响应，表明涡旋-反涡旋构型的复杂贡献。
AI.motivation: 理解超导共面谐振器在垂直磁场下的性能退化机制，特别是阿布里科索夫涡旋对器件性能的最终限制。
AI.method: 实验测量铌四分之一波长共面谐振器的传输参数S21在不同垂直磁场（0-40 Oe）和温度（18 mK-5 K）下的变化，分析谐振峰跳变行为及频率、品质因子的响应。
AI.result: 发现了磁场扫描中谐振峰的阶梯状跳跃行为，场反转后跳跃间隔约1.7-1.8 Oe呈准等距分布；谐振频率和内部品质因子表现出非比例响应。
AI.conclusion: 阶梯状跳跃被解释为多涡旋进入/退出事件的特征，非比例响应揭示了涡旋-反涡旋构型的复杂性，该工作将推动对大规模涡旋-反涡旋系统离散性质的研究。

title: Effective increase of a superconducting critical temperature in a high-entropy electron mixture
summary: We show theoretically that a superconducting critical temperature can be effectively increased in a high-entropy mixture of electrons belonging to conduction and valence bands. In order to employ the entropy of mixing into the superconducting phase dynamics, we suggest to use a metallic trap that removes quasiparticle excitations from the superconductor. This makes the concentration of Cooper pairs a dynamic variable of the entropy of mixing, and thus affects the Ginzburg-Landau functional of the superconductor effectively reducing the first expansion coefficient or, in other words, increasing the critical temperature.

AI.tldr: 本文从理论上证明，通过高熵混合导带和价带电子，并利用金属陷阱去除准粒子激发，可以使库珀对浓度成为混合熵的动态变量，从而有效提高超导临界温度。
AI.motivation: 探索通过高熵混合效应提高超导临界温度的新机制。
AI.method: 提出使用金属陷阱去除超导体中的准粒子激发，使库珀对浓度成为混合熵的动态变量，从而修改Ginzburg-Landau泛函。
AI.result: 高熵混合效应能有效减小Ginzburg-Landau泛函的第一展开系数，即提高临界温度。
AI.conclusion: 混合熵机制可用于调控超导相变动力学，为提升超导临界温度提供了新思路。

title: Lattice-Spring Analogy for Isotropic Elasticity
summary: This study introduces an innovative Isotropic Elastic Lattice Spring Model (IELSM) that addresses the fundamental limitation of classical lattice spring models: the constraint of fixed Poisson's ratio. By amending the total strain energy within the Lattice Spring Model (LSM), IELSM provides a self-consistent formulation for simulating isotropic elastic materials with arbitrary Poisson's ratios. The model's core innovation lies in augmenting classical axial spring frameworks with additional volumetric constraints, establishing a direct and exact mapping between IELSM's parameters and macroscopic elastic constants. This enables simulation across the full admissible Poisson's ratio: -1 < ν < 1 under plane stress and -1 < ν< 0.5 under plane strain conditions. Eigenvalue analysis indicates that the IELSM has better numerical stability compared to the standard bilinear quadrilateral element and the constant strain triangular element. The characteristic of the numerical implementation lies in directly decomposing the additional volumetric constraints into an equivalent combination of standard mechanical components (axial, shear and rotational springs), laying the foundation for the realization of fracture simulation based on discrete methods. Comprehensive validation through uniaxial tension, pure shear, stress concentration around a circular hole, and stress singularity analyses for central and crucifix-shaped cracks demonstrates IELSM's exceptional accuracy, convergence and computational robustness. The model exhibits excellent performance in stress intensity factor calculations at crack tips, validating its effectiveness for singular stress field analysis. This work bridges the gap between LSM and continuum mechanics, establishing an analog framework that maintains theoretical consistency while offering computational accuracy for the solution of elastic boundary value problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出各向同性弹性晶格弹簧模型（IELSM），通过增加体积约束克服了经典晶格弹簧模型固定泊松比的限制，实现了任意泊松比下的精确弹性模拟，并在断裂力学分析中展现出优异性能。
AI.motivation: 经典晶格弹簧模型（LSM）只能模拟固定泊松比的材料，无法适用于具有不同泊松比的各向同性弹性材料，这限制了LSM在连续介质力学模拟中的应用。
AI.method: 在经典轴向弹簧框架中增加体积约束，修正总应变能，建立模型参数与宏观弹性常数之间的直接精确映射；将体积约束分解为轴向、剪切和旋转弹簧的等价组合。
AI.result: 通过单轴拉伸、纯剪切、圆孔应力集中、中心裂纹和十字形裂纹的应力奇异性分析，验证了IELSM的高精度、收敛性和计算鲁棒性；特征值分析表明其数值稳定性优于标准双线性四边形单元和常应变三角形单元。
AI.conclusion: IELSM桥接了晶格弹簧模型与连续介质力学，建立了保持理论一致性的模拟框架，为基于离散方法的断裂模拟奠定了基础。

title: Unveiling Magnetic Frustration via the Elastocaloric Effect
summary: Motivated by experimental progress in pressure and strain tuning of quantum materials, we examine the thermodynamic response of frustrated magnets to uniaxial strain. Specifically, we study Ising and Heisenberg models on spatially anisotropic triangular (and, for the Ising model, also kagome) lattices. We determine the entropy as a function of temperature and strain, and use it to compute the elastic Grüneisen ratio $η$. The Ising models can be strain-tuned into and out of classical spin-liquid phases, and we show that $η$ can become arbitrarily large at low temperature $T$ near the point of maximal frustration, a universal hallmark of an extensive ground-state entropy. In contrast, the spin-$1/2$ Heisenberg model is moderately frustrated and displays multiple $T=0$ phase transitions. These transitions dominate $η$ at low $T$ while the intermediate-$T$ behavior is similar to that of the Ising model. We discuss the extent to which the elastic Grüneisen ratio can be used to deduce the phase diagram, and we connect our results to recent experiments on triangular-lattice magnets.

AI.tldr: 本文通过理论计算研究了受挫磁体在单轴应变下的热力学响应，发现弹性Grüneisen比率η在经典自旋液体相附近可变得非常大，这是基态熵的普遍标志。
AI.motivation: 受量子材料压力和应变调控实验进展的启发，作者希望理解受挫磁体对应变的热力学响应，并探索弹性Grüneisen比率作为相图诊断工具的潜力。
AI.method: 研究了空间各向异性三角晶格上的Ising和Heisenberg模型（以及Ising模型下的kagome晶格），计算了熵随温度和应变的变化，进而计算弹性Grüneisen比率η。
AI.result: Ising模型可通过应变调控进出经典自旋液相，在最大受挫点附近η在低温下可变得任意大；自旋1/2 Heisenberg模型中等受挫，有多个T=0相变，低温下η由相变主导，中等温度行为与Ising模型类似。
AI.conclusion: 弹性Grüneisen比率可作为探测受挫磁体相图的有效工具，相关结果可与三角晶格磁体的近期实验相联系。

title: Strong universality class in disordered systems
summary: Disordered systems are very rich laboratories for exploring complex systems. In particular, disordered magnetic systems have been extremely important in the last five decades for understanding a wide range of phenomena. In this work, we use the Edwards-Anderson Hamiltonian to obtain the thermodynamic properties of disordered magnetic systems. In this way, we conduct a systematic investigation of magnetization, correlation functions, order parameter, and fractal dimensions, in function of disorder. In this context, the autocorrelation function for order--parameter fluctuations, introduced by Fisher ( Journal of Mathematical Physics 5, 944322 (1964)), provides an important mathematical framework for understanding the second-order phase transition at equilibrium. However, his analysis is restricted to a Euclidean space of dimension $d$, and an exponent $η$ is introduced to correct the spatial behavior of the correlation function at $T=T_c$. In recent work, Lima et al ( Phys. Rev. E 110, L062107 (2024)) demonstrated that at $T_c$ a fractal analysis is necessary for a complete description of the correlation function. We use Monte Carlo simulations to validate analytical results and to show how disorder alters critical exponents , giving rise to different universality classes. On the other hand, there is a subgroup of critical exponents and fractal dimensions that are invariant with disorder. This subgroup heralds a strong universality class.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用Edwards-Anderson哈密顿量，通过蒙特卡洛模拟系统地研究了无序磁系统的热力学性质，包括磁化强度、关联函数、序参量和分形维数。研究发现，无序会改变临界指数，但存在一组对无序不变的临界指数和分形维数，预示着强普适类（strong universality class）的存在。同时，Fisher的自相关函数分析虽提供了重要框架，但在临界温度处需要结合分形分析才能完整描述关联函数行为。
AI.motivation: 无序系统是探索复杂系统的丰富实验室，而理解无序如何影响磁系统的临界现象及其普适类，是凝聚态物理中的核心问题。作者希望超越Fisher经典理论在欧几里得空间中的局限，引入分形分析，揭示无序对临界指数的具体影响，并寻找不依赖于无序强度的普适性规律。
AI.method: 采用Edwards-Anderson哈密顿量作为模型，结合蒙特卡洛模拟进行数值验证。利用Fisher提出的序参量涨落自关联函数作为数学框架，并引入Lima等人最新发展的分形分析方法，系统计算磁化强度、关联函数、序参量及分形维数随无序程度的变化。
AI.result: 无序会改变临界指数，产生不同的普适类；但存在一个子集的临界指数和分形维数对无序具有不变性，这揭示了强普适类的存在。
AI.conclusion: 无序磁系统在临界点处的完整描述需要结合分形分析，而强普适类的发现为理解和分类无序系统中的临界行为提供了新的理论视角。

title: Radio-frequency reflectometry in silicon carbide large-area transistors
summary: Radio-frequency (RF) reflectometry is widely used for high-bandwidth readout of semiconductor quantum devices at cryogenic temperatures, but its application has mainly been limited to nanoscale structures with relatively small capacitances. Here, we investigate RF readout in a different regime by applying gate-based reflectometry to a large-area silicon carbide transistor with parasitic capacitances orders of magnitude larger than those of typical quantum devices, conditions normally expected to hinder RF readout. We observe a gate-dependent RF response which degrades and eventually vanishes as temperature is lowered, although MOSFET operation in DC transport is maintained down to deep cryogenic temperatures. We attribute this behaviour to impedance changes introduced by carrier freeze-out in the transistor drift region, and propose a modified circuit configuration designed to restore sensitivity under these conditions. These results establish how parasitic pathways and device geometry can limit RF readout, providing insight into the design of scalable cryogenic-CMOS quantum systems.

AI.tldr: 研究了大面积SiC MOSFET在低温下的射频反射测量行为，发现载流子冻结导致射频响应随温度降低而消失，并提出改进电路方案恢复灵敏度。
AI.motivation: 现有射频反射测量主要应用于小电容纳米结构，而大电容大面积的量子器件场景下该技术的可行性及限制因素尚不明确，需要探索其适用边界。
AI.method: 对大面积SiC MOSFET进行栅极反射测量，在低温下测量其射频响应，并结合DC传输特性分析阻抗变化机制，提出改进电路配置。
AI.result: 观察到栅依赖的射频响应随温度降低而减弱直至消失；DC传输特性在深低温下仍保持正常；发现该现象由漂移区载流子冻结引起的阻抗变化导致。
AI.conclusion: 证明了寄生路径和器件几何结构会限制射频反射测量的应用，提出的改进电路配置可恢复低温下的灵敏度，为可扩展低温CMOS量子系统设计提供指导。

title: Disorder-driven symmetry suppression by van der Waals planar defects in a magnetic topological insulator
summary: Magnetic topological insulators offer a platform to control electronic topology through magnetic order, yet reliable routes to tune their properties remain limited. Here, we show that ion irradiation allows to modify the magnetic and the topological properties of the van der Waals magnetic topological insulator MnBi$_2$Te$_4$. Using inert ion beams, intrinsic defects are introduced via collision cascades without chemical doping. We identify two distinct regimes. At low fluence, cation antisite disorder leads to a near-complete redistribution of Bi over cation sites while preserving long-range crystallographic order, accompanied by a transition from $p$-type to $n$-type transport. At high fluence, cation-anion intermixing drives the formation of a previously unreported layer-disordered phase characterized by a high density of van der Waals-specific planar defects, including swapped bilayers. Despite significant structural disorder, the system retains partial periodic order up to high displacement levels. Magnetometry and X-ray spectroscopy show that the Mn high-spin state and antiferromagnetic interactions persist, while magnetic anisotropy is strongly reduced. At the same time, the anomalous Hall response is suppressed by over an order of magnitude, far exceeding the change in magnetization, indicating a direct modification of Berry curvature. These results establish ion irradiation as a means to tune topology through defect engineering and reveal a disorder-driven approach to control symmetry and electronic structure in van der Waals magnetic materials.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了利用离子辐照技术，在不引入化学掺杂的情况下，通过引入固有缺陷来调控范德华磁性拓扑绝缘体MnBi₂Te₄的磁性和拓扑性质。发现了两个不同辐照剂量区间：低剂量下阳离子反位无序导致Bi在阳离子位点重新分布并实现p-n型转变；高剂量下阴阳离子混合形成一种新型层无序相。尽管结构高度无序，Mn高自旋态和反铁磁相互作用仍保持，但磁各向异性显著降低，反常霍尔效应被抑制超过一个数量级，表明贝里曲率被直接调控。
AI.motivation: 磁性拓扑绝缘体提供了通过磁序控制电子拓扑的平台，但调控其性质的可靠途径仍然有限，因此需要探索新的调控方法。
AI.method: 使用惰性离子束进行辐照，通过碰撞级联引入固有缺陷而不引入化学掺杂，结合磁测量、X射线光谱和输运测量表征材料性质变化。
AI.result: 发现两个辐照剂量区间：低剂量区阳离子反位无序实现p-n型转变；高剂量区形成含交换双层等平面缺陷的层无序相。Mn高自旋态和反铁磁相互作用保留，但磁各向异性显著降低，反常霍尔效应被抑制超过一个数量级，远超磁化强度的变化。
AI.conclusion: 离子辐照可作为通过缺陷工程调控拓扑性质的有效手段，揭示了通过无序控制范德华磁性材料对称性和电子结构的新途径。

title: Reweighting free energy profiles between universal machine learning interatomic potentials for fast consensus building
summary: Free energy profiles serve as a fundamental bridge between microscopic atomic fluctuations and macroscopic thermodynamic observables. Estimating the free energy profile along a reaction coordinate, referred to as the potential of mean force (PMF), with density functional theory (DFT) accuracy is computationally expensive. Universal machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) drastically reduce this cost, but their accuracy is strongly determined by their training data and hence can be uncertain for a given system. In this work, we present a systematic and scalable framework for reweighting PMFs, initially sampled with a single 'source' MLIP, across a representative suite of target MLIPs. Because traditional direct exponential reweighting fails for large system sizes due to low phase-space overlap between potentials, we deploy robust analytical corrections. Applying this to a complex 601-atom system of Li$^+$ transport in a nanoconfined electrolyte, we demonstrate that a mean energy-gap approximation effectively bypasses statistical collapse, producing a highly stable PMF matching the target PMF. Using this approach, we recover high-fidelity target thermodynamics across multiple DFT reference levels (PBE+D3, PBE-sol, r$^2$SCAN,r$^2$SCAN-D4) at a fraction of the computational cost of full simulations. Furthermore, thermodynamic analysis reveals that the studied MLIPs partition into two distinct clusters driven by their training data. Our reweighting framework successfully recovers target thermodynamic properties--specifically, reaction and activation free energies--even when the phase-space overlap between potentials is critically low. Ultimately, this approach establishes a vital diagnostic protocol to achieve affordable cross-model consensus on materials chemistry properties without redundant, resource-intensive simulations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种系统性的重加权框架，利用平均能隙近似，仅通过一次机器学习原子间势能（MLIP）模拟即可高效恢复多个DFT级别的自由能曲线（PMF），避免了冗余计算，并在纳米受限电解质中的锂离子输运案例中验证了其准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: DFT精度的自由能计算成本极高；通用MLIP虽能降低成本但其准确性受限于训练数据，导致自由能估计存在不确定性；传统重加权方法（如指数重加权）在大体系下因相空间重叠不足而失效。
AI.method: 采用平均能隙近似（mean energy-gap approximation）对单个"源"MLIP采样得到的PMF进行重加权，从而高效校正到多个"目标"MLIP（PBE+D3、PBE-sol、r²SCAN、r²SCAN-D4）的参考水平。
AI.result: 在601原子的Li⁺纳米约束电解质体系中，该方法成功恢复了多个DFT级别的PMF，计算成本仅为完整模拟的一小部分；揭示了MLIP根据训练数据可分为两个聚类；即使在相空间重叠极低的情况下也能准确恢复反应自由能和活化自由能。
AI.conclusion: 该重加权框架为材料化学性质提供了一种经济高效的跨模型共识诊断协议，无需重复进行资源密集的模拟。

title: Tunable Crossed Andreev Reflection in Bipolar Magnetic Semiconductors
comment: 5 pages, 4 captioned figures. Comments are welcome
summary: Crossed Andreev reflection (CAR) is a nonlocal quantum transport phenomenon that arises at the interface between a superconductor and two spatially separated metals. In this process, an electron incident from one metal combines with another electron originating from the other metal to form a Cooper pair in the superconductor. As a consequence, a hole is emitted into the second metal, establishing a nonlocal electron-hole conversion process. In contrast to local Andreev reflection -- where electron-to-hole conversion occurs within the same region -- CAR intrinsically links two spatially separated carriers, giving rise to nonlocal correlations and quantum entanglement. In bipolar magnetic semiconductors (BMSs), the conduction and valence bands possess opposite spin polarizations. We propose to achieve tunable control of CAR by independently adjusting the chemical potentials of the two regions. By engineering the alignment of spin-polarized bands in the two BMS leads, CAR can be selectively enhanced or suppressed. This tunability enables precise manipulation of nonlocal transport, and correlated electron dynamics, offering promising prospects for spintronic and superconducting device applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用双极性磁性半导体（BMS）实现可调控的交叉Andreev反射（CAR），通过独立调节两个区域的化学势，选择性增强或抑制非局域电子-空穴转换过程，为自旋电子学和超导器件应用提供新方案。
AI.motivation: CAR是一种非局域量子输运现象，能产生非局域关联和量子纠缠，但目前缺乏有效的调控手段。作者希望利用BMS中导带和价带具有相反自旋极化的特性，实现对CAR过程的可调控制。
AI.method: 利用双极性磁性半导体（BMS）作为两端电极，通过独立调节两个区域（BMS lead）的化学势，改变自旋极化能带的对齐方式，从而选择性地增强或抑制CAR过程。
AI.result: 通过调节化学势可以精确操控非局域输运和关联电子动力学，实现对CAR的可调增强或抑制。
AI.conclusion: 该方案为自旋电子学和超导器件中实现可调控的非局域电子-空穴转换提供了新途径，具有应用前景。

title: Spatiotemporal decoupled physics-informed Stone-Weierstrass neural operator for long-time prediction of time-dependent parametric PDEs
summary: Driven by rapid advances in artificial intelligence and modern GPU computing capabilities, deep learning methods based on the optimization paradigm have provided new pathways to solve spatiotemporal physical problems, whose mathematical core lies in solving partial differential equations (PDEs). As an emerging class of function-space learning methods, neural operators (NOs) have exhibited great potential in efficient PDE solving. However, existing mainstream neural operator frameworks suffer from critical bottlenecks when modeling time-dependent PDEs over long time horizons, including accuracy degradation, insufficient stability, high training costs, and excessive memory consumption, which severely limit their practical deployment. To address these challenges in long-time prediction with neural operators, we propose a novel spatiotemporally decoupled physics-informed neural operator architecture, termed the physics-informed Stone-Weierstrass neural operator (PI-SWNO). The design is theoretically grounded in the decoupling paradigm combining time-invariant spatial basis functions with time-varying evolution coefficients, as well as the Stone-Weierstrass approximation theorem. By encoding spatial and temporal information via two separate subnetworks, the framework structurally mitigates the accumulation of errors over extended time intervals. Furthermore, we introduce a time-marching batch-wise sampling strategy to resolve the memory bottleneck of full-range modeling over extended time spans, ensuring continuity and convergence of full-time-domain solutions.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种物理信息的Stone-Weierstrass神经算子(PI-SWNO)，通过时空解耦范式解决现有神经算子在长时间PDE求解中的精度退化、稳定性不足和高内存消耗等问题。
AI.motivation: 现有神经算子在长时间依赖PDE建模中存在精度退化、稳定性不足、训练成本高和内存消耗过大等瓶颈，严重限制实际部署。
AI.method: 基于Stone-Weierstrass逼近定理的时空解耦范式：时间不变空间基函数+时变演化系数；两个子网络分别编码时空信息；引入时间推进批采样策略解决内存瓶颈。
AI.result: 结构性地缓解了长时间区间上的误差累积，解决了全范围建模的内存瓶颈，保证了全时域解的连续性和收敛性。
AI.conclusion: PI-SWNO通过理论驱动的时空解耦设计有效解决了长时间神经算子PDE求解的关键挑战，在精度、稳定性和计算效率方面具有优势。

title: Itinerant antiferromagnetism in the antagonistic pair compound Y$_4$Co$_3$Ag
summary: Low dimensional crystallographic motifs have long been associated with desirable physical properties. The confinement of electrons to low dimensions is thought to enhance quantum fluctuations and may promote correlated phenomena. Here, using the antagonistic pair concept, we add Y to the immiscible Co-Ag pair to discover Y$_4$Co$_3$Ag. This compound adopts a monoclinic $I$2/$m$ structure consisting of Y channels that are filled by one-dimensional zigzag and hexagonal Co chains, which extend along the crystallographic $b$-axis with no nearest neighbor contacts between Co and Ag atoms. Transport, magnetic, and specific heat measurements reveal that Y$_4$Co$_3$Ag orders antiferromagnetically at $T_N=14.9$ K with an effective magnetic moment $μ_{\text{eff}}$ = 1.4 $μ_{\text{B}}$/Co. Specific heat measurements show only a small entropy loss on the order of $0.1\,R\ln2$ associated with magnetic order, and magnetization isotherms, in DC fields up to 70 kOe at 1.8 K and in pulsed fields up to 600 kOe at 500 mK, indicate a small ordered moment of less than 0.2 $μ_B$/Co. Taken together, our results imply the presence of small, itinerant moments and strong fluctuations in Y$_4$Co$_3$Ag, suggesting that Y$_4$Co$_3$Ag may be a promising candidate material to investigate itinerant magnetic interactions in a quasi-one dimensional system.

AI.tldr: 本文通过拮抗对概念在互不混溶的Co-Ag体系中加入Y，成功合成了Y₄Co₃Ag化合物。该材料具有单斜I2/m结构，包含沿b轴延伸的一维锯齿形和六边形Co链，在14.9K表现出反铁磁有序，但磁矩很小（<0.2 μB/Co），表明存在巡游磁性和强涨落，是研究准一维系统中巡游磁相互作用的候选材料。
AI.motivation: 低维结晶构型被认为能增强量子涨落并促进关联现象，但如何设计和发现新型低维磁性材料仍是挑战。作者利用拮抗对概念，在原本互不混溶的Co-Ag体系中引入第三种元素Y，旨在探索具有准一维结构的新材料。
AI.method: 采用拮抗对概念选择Y加入Co-Ag体系，合成Y₄Co₃Ag化合物；通过晶体结构解析确定其单斜I2/m结构；利用输运、磁化率和比热测量表征其物理性质。
AI.result: Y₄Co₃Ag在TN=14.9K反铁磁有序，有效磁矩μeff=1.4 μB/Co，但有序磁矩很小(<0.2 μB/Co)；比热显示与磁有序相关的熵损失仅约0.1Rln2，表明巡游磁性和强涨落特征。
AI.conclusion: Y₄Co₃Ag中存在小的巡游磁矩和强涨落，是研究准一维体系中巡游磁相互作用的理想候选材料。

title: A Finite-State Gibbs Construction from a Recognition Cost
comment: 50 pages, 2 figures. Python scripts for numerical tables and figures included as ancillary files
summary: On a finite outcome space, the canonical Gibbs distribution is usually obtained by maximizing Shannon entropy at fixed mean of an externally supplied energy functional. This paper studies the finite-state consequences of a ratio-cost construction instead: after adopting the normalized d'Alembert degree-two closure called the Recognition Composition Law (RCL), with unit log-curvature calibration at the reference ratio, the continuous nontrivial positive branch is $J(x)=\tfrac12(x+x^{-1})-1=\cosh(\log x)-1$. Given the induced cost vector $X_ω=J(r_ω)$, multinomial counting and convex duality recover the finite-state Gibbs weights and the identity $F_{\mathrm{R}}(q)-F_{\mathrm{R}}(p)=T_{\mathrm{R}}\,D_{\mathrm{KL}}(q\Vert p)$; the entropy-maximization steps are classical once the cost is fixed. New technical content includes a non-asymptotic Stirling bound and soft-shell constrained-type theorems for real-valued costs. A three-state example compares the Gibbs law to squared-log, affinity-as-energy, and Tsallis alternatives at the same cost vector and mean-cost constraint, with sample-size power calculations at fixed RCL ground truth. The framework is conditional on axioms (A1)--(A3) and restricted to finite outcome spaces with strictly positive weights; it does not derive the composition law from a more primitive principle.

AI.tldr: 本文在有限结果空间上，采用归一化 d'Alembert 二次闭包（RCL）及单位对数曲率校准，导出比率成本函数 J(x)=½(x+x⁻¹)-1=cosh(log x)-1，并结合多项式计数与凸对偶恢复有限状态 Gibbs 权重及自由能差-相对熵恒等式；此外提供非渐近 Stirling 界与软壳约束型定理，并通过三态示例与传统熵最大化方法进行比较。
AI.motivation: 传统 Gibbs 分布在有限结果空间上通过最大化 Shannon 熵得到，但依赖外部能量泛函的均值约束。本文尝试用比率成本构造替代能量函数，以期在有限状态空间中导出更自然的 Gibbs 权重形式，并建立与相对熵的直接联系。
AI.method: 采用归一化的 d'Alembert 二次闭包（RCL）作为组合律，以单位对数曲率在校准参考比率处进行标定，导出代价向量 X_ω=J(r_ω)。然后通过多项式计数与凸对偶技术恢复有限状态 Gibbs 权重，并推导自由能差与 KL 散度之间的恒等式。同时给出非渐近 Stirling 界和软壳约束型定理，并通过三状态示例与平方对数、亲和力-能量及 Tsallis 替代方案进行比较。
AI.result: 得到连续非平凡正分支 J(x)=½(x+x⁻¹)-1=cosh(log x)-1；恢复了有限状态 Gibbs 权重及恒等式 F_R(q)-F_R(p)=T_R D_KL(q∥p)；提供了非渐近 Stirling 界和软壳约束型定理；三状态示例展示了所提框架与传统方法在相同代价向量和均值约束下的差异及样本量功效计算。
AI.conclusion: 本文在有限结果空间和严格正权重条件下，基于 RCL 和比率成本构造成功导出了 Gibbs 分布及其与相对熵的关系。但框架依赖于设定的公理（A1-A3），且未从更基本原则推导组合律，因此其适用范围受限。

title: Multifractal and Ergodic Properties of Conductance Fluctuations under Strong Disorder
summary: Understanding the stochastic properties of conductance fluctuations in disordered mesoscopic systems is fundamental to quantum transport. In this work, we investigate the multifractal and ergodic properties of the fictitious time series of conductance in two-dimensional tight-binding models under varying Anderson disorder. Using standard multifractal analysis, we show that conductance fluctuations exhibit a transition from non-ergodic to ergodic behavior as the disorder strength increases, as evidenced by the decay of the conductance correlation function. Remarkably, multifractality persists in both regimes; however, it becomes insensitive to shuffling in the strong-disorder (ergodic) regime, suggesting that distributional effects dominate temporal organization. On the contrary, in the weakly disordered (non-ergodic) regime, long-range correlations play a significant role. These findings are robust against changes in lead geometry (asymmetric vs. symmetric). Our results provide new insights into the interplay between ergodicity, multifractality, and rare events in disordered quantum transport.

AI.tldr: 本文通过二维紧束缚模型研究无序介观系统中电导涨落的多重分形与遍历性，发现随无序强度增加，电导涨落从非遍历转变为遍历行为，多重分形性在两区域均存在，但在强无序（遍历）区对打乱不敏感，表明分布效应主导；弱无序（非遍历）区长程关联起重要作用，且结果对电极几何形状鲁棒。
AI.motivation: 理解无序介观系统中电导涨落的随机性质对量子输运基础理论至关重要，本文旨在探究电导时序的多重分形与遍历性，以及两者之间的相互作用。
AI.method: 采用二维紧束缚模型，施加不同强度的安德森无序，对电导的虚拟时间序列进行标准多重分形分析，并检验电导相关函数的衰减行为以及打乱（shuffling）对多重分形特征的影响。
AI.result: 电导涨落随无序强度增加从非遍历转变为遍历行为；多重分形性在两个区域均存在，但在强无序（遍历）区对打乱不敏感，弱无序（非遍历）区长程关联起显著作用；结果在不同电极几何结构下保持稳健。
AI.conclusion: 本工作揭示了无序量子输运中遍历性、多重分形性与稀有事件之间的相互作用，为理解介观系统中电导涨落的复杂统计性质提供了新的见解。

title: Chemical Origins of Non-Bonded Interactions Within and Between Solids
summary: Non-bonded interactions govern structure, stability, and function across a wide range of solid-state materials, yet their chemical origins are often difficult to resolve from total energies alone. Here we generalize absolutely localized molecular orbital energy decomposition analysis to quantify and interpret non-bonded interactions within and between solids at the density functional theory level. Across molecular crystals, moiré heterobilayers, and layered perovskite heterostructures, this framework separates lattice-formation energies, interlayer binding energies, and band-structure changes into chemically intuitive contributions from frozen interactions, polarization, and charge transfer. The analysis reveals how dispersion controls polymorph stability in pharmaceutical crystals, how local stacking modulates interlayer coupling in MoS2/WSe2, and how alkali-cation substitution switches the quantum-well character of layered perovskite heterostructures. By connecting emergent solid-state properties to microscopic interaction mechanisms, this framework provides a chemically transparent basis for understanding and designing complex materials.

AI.tldr: 该研究将绝对定域分子轨道能量分解分析推广到固体材料中，用于量化DFT框架下的非键相互作用，揭示了分子晶体、异质双层和钙钛矿异质结构中的色散、堆叠和阳离子取代效应。
AI.motivation: 固体材料中的非键相互作用难以从总能量中解析其化学起源，需要一种方法将总能分解为化学直觉上可理解的贡献。
AI.method: 将绝对定域分子轨道能量分解分析推广到固体材料，在DFT水平上量化非键相互作用，分解为冻结相互作用、极化和电荷转移等化学贡献。
AI.result: 成功应用于分子晶体、MoS2/WSe2异质双层和层状钙钛矿异质结构，揭示了色散对多晶型稳定性的控制、局部堆叠对层间耦合的调控以及碱金属阳离子取代对量子阱特性的切换。
AI.conclusion: 该框架将固态材料的涌现性质与微观相互作用机制联系起来，为理解和设计复杂材料提供了化学透明的理论基础。

title: Data-driven complete basis set limit estimates from a minimal auxiliary basis
summary: Quantum chemistry calculations are often performed using atom-centered basis sets which are chosen to balance accuracy and cost. While they are systematically improvable, the total energy converges slowly with basis set size towards the complete basis set (CBS) limit. Common extrapolation methods require several intermediate-quality calculations to afford an estimate of the CBS energy. We propose combining a pairwise interaction model with a minimal complementary auxiliary basis set (CABS) baseline to estimate the CBS energy from a single quantum chemistry calculation in a minimal basis set via Kernel-Ridge-Regression (KRR), which is more efficient than both direct and $Δ$-machine learning. We show that KRR on standard molecular representations can be improved by approximating atom-wise local kernels using Chebyshev polynomials which allows us to train KRR models efficiently on moderate compute resources, further enabling a data-driven approach towards CBS combining physical baselines capturing leading order effects with data-efficient machine learning models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合配对相互作用模型与最小辅助基组基线的方法，通过核岭回归从单次量子化学计算中估计完备基组极限能量，相比传统外推和Δ-机器学习更高效，并利用切比雪夫多项式近似原子局部核提升训练效率。
AI.motivation: 传统量子化学计算中，基组尺寸增大时总能量收敛缓慢，而常用外推方法需要多次中等质量计算才能估计CBS能量，成本较高。作者希望从单次最小基组计算出发，高效估计CBS能量。
AI.method: 1. 使用配对相互作用模型结合最小辅助基组（CABS）基线；2. 通过核岭回归（KRR）从单次最小基组计算估计CBS能量；3. 利用切比雪夫多项式近似原子局部核，提升KRR模型在中等计算资源上的训练效率。
AI.result: 该方法比直接计算和Δ-机器学习更高效；原子局部核的切比雪夫近似使KRR模型可在中等计算资源上高效训练，实现了数据驱动的CBS估计。
AI.conclusion: 通过物理基线（捕捉主导效应）与数据高效机器学习模型的结合，实现了从单次最小基组计算高效估计CBS能量，为量子化学计算中的基组外推提供了新思路。

title: Thermodynamic signatures of a field-induced ordered intermediate phase in Na$_2$Co$_2$TeO$_6$
summary: The honeycomb cobaltate Na$_2$Co$_2$TeO$_6$ has recently been proposed as a candidate material for hosting field-induced quantum spin liquid (QSL) behavior. Here, we present a comprehensive thermodynamic study of its low-temperature, high-field phase diagram using magnetization, specific heat, and magnetocaloric-effect measurements down to 1 K. In zero field, we observe a weak residual moment that provides further insight into the nature of the magnetic ground state. For in-plane magnetic fields ($B \parallel a^*$), we identify three field-induced transitions at $B_{c1} \simeq 6$ T, $B_{c2} \simeq 7.8$ T, and $B_{c3} \simeq 10.4$ T. The magnetic Grüneisen parameter and specific heat reveal clear thermodynamic signatures of these successive phase transitions enclosing two intermediate phases. Contrary to expectations for a field-induced QSL, the phase between $B_{c2}$ and $B_{c3}$ lacks enhanced magnetic entropy but instead shows behavior consistent with a distinct ordered state. Above $B_{c3}$, the absence of additional anomalies indicates a crossover to a conventional spin-polarized regime. Our results place stringent thermodynamic constraints on the proposed QSL scenario in Na$_2$Co$_2$TeO$_6$, calling for further microscopic investigations to establish the precise nature of the field-induced phases.

AI.tldr: 本文对蜂窝状钴酸盐Na₂Co₂TeO₆在低温(1K)、强磁场下的相图进行了热力学研究，发现三个场致相变(Bc1~6T, Bc2~7.8T, Bc3~10.4T)，其中间相并非预期的量子自旋液体态，而是有序态，对现有QSL假说提出挑战。
AI.motivation: Na₂Co₂TeO₆近期被提出可能承载场致量子自旋液体(QSL)行为，但缺乏严格的热力学证据。本研究旨在通过系统的热力学测量检验这一假说。
AI.method: 采用磁化强度、比热和磁热效应测量，在1K低温、最高超过10T的面内磁场(B∥a*)条件下进行综合热力学表征。
AI.result: (1) 零场下观察到弱剩余磁矩；(2) 三个场致相变分别位于~6T、~7.8T和~10.4T；(3) Bc2-Bc3区间的中间相未表现出增强的磁熵，与有序态行为一致；(4) Bc3以上为自旋极化区。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果对Na₂Co₂TeO₆中场致QSL假说提出了严格的热力学约束，否定了Bc2-Bc3区间为QSL的预期，呼吁进一步的微观研究以确定场致相的确切性质。

title: Short-time critical dynamics in the classical cubic dimer model
summary: The classical dimer model on the cubic lattice hosts a columnar ordered phase and a disordered Coulomb phase, separated by a continuous phase transition that lies beyond the conventional Landau-Ginzburg-Wilson paradigm. While its equilibrium critical properties have been extensively studied, the nonequilibrium critical dynamics of this model--particularly in the short-time regime--remains largely unexplored. In this work, we investigate the short-time critical dynamics near the transition using large-scale Monte Carlo simulations. By quenching the system from both ordered and disordered initial states with vanishing initial correlation length, we analyze the scaling behaviors of the order parameter and its time correlation function in the short-time stage. From these scaling behaviors, we accurately determine the critical temperature $T_c = 0.672(1)$ and the static critical exponent $β/ν= 0.581(5)$ according to the scaling theory of the short-time dynamics. These results are in excellent agreement with previous equilibrium studies. Moreover, we extract the dynamic critical exponent $z = 1.92(1)$ and, notably, find a negative critical initial slip exponent $θ= -1.052(5)$. This unusual negative value contrasts sharply with the positive $θ$ typically observed in conventional critical dynamics. We attribute this anomalous behavior to the combined effects of the emergent SO(5) symmetry at criticality and the local U(1) gauge constraint (Gauss law), which enforces a conserved diffusive dynamics and enhances fluctuations in the short-time regime. Our results provide the first comprehensive characterization of nonequilibrium short-time criticality in the three-dimensional dimer model, shedding new light on the universal dynamical features of phase transitions beyond the Landau-Ginzburg-Wilson framework.

AI.tldr: 本文通过大规模蒙特卡洛模拟，研究三维立方晶格二聚体模型在连续相变附近的非平衡短时临界动力学，精确测定了临界温度、静态临界指数和动力学临界指数，并发现了一个罕见的负临界初始滑移指数，归因于SO(5)对称性和U(1)规范约束的联合效应。
AI.motivation: 二聚体模型的平衡临界性质已得到广泛研究，但其非平衡临界动力学——特别是短时标度行为——尚属空白。本文旨在填补这一空白，揭示超越经典朗道-金茨堡-威尔逊框架的普适动力学特征。
AI.method: 采用大规模蒙特卡洛模拟，从有序和无序两种初始态（初始关联长度为零）淬火，分析短时阶段序参量及其时间关联函数的标度行为，依据短时动力学标度理论确定临界参数。
AI.result: 精确测定临界温度Tc=0.672(1)，静态临界指数β/ν=0.581(5)，与平衡研究吻合；动力学临界指数z=1.92(1)；发现临界初始滑移指数θ=-1.052(5)，为罕见的负值。
AI.conclusion: 负的θ值源于临界点涌现的SO(5)对称性与局域U(1)规范约束（高斯定律）的共同作用，后者施加了守恒扩散动力学并增强了短时涨落。本文首次全面刻画了三维二聚体模型的非平衡短时临界性，为超越朗道-金茨堡-威尔逊框架的相变普适动力学提供了新视角。

title: Entropy Production from Spin--Vibrational Coupling in Endohedral-Fullerene Qubits Encapsulated in Suspended Carbon Nanotubes
summary: Hybrid carbon nanotube-fullerene architectures provide a controllable platform for studying irreversibility and information flow in structured quantum environments. We analyze entropy generation in a system where paramagnetic endohedral fullerenes, such as N@C$_{60}$ and P@C$_{60}$, are encapsulated inside a suspended carbon nanotube (CNT) resonator, with selected multi-level fullerene spin states forming an effective qubit coupled to quantized CNT flexural modes. Building on prior work on fullerene-filled CNTs, spin-phonon control in suspended nanotubes, and phase-space propagators for damped driven oscillators, we develop a hybrid open-system model combining driven quantum Brownian motion of the CNT with an effective Jaynes-Cummings spin-vibrational interaction. The resonator dynamics are represented by a Wigner function whose evolution is written analytically in terms of the initial Wigner distribution and a Gaussian propagator. This phase-space description separates drive-induced displacement, diffusion, and damping, and connects these processes directly to entropy flow. The coupled spin-mechanical dynamics are embedded in a Lindblad master equation including mechanical damping, spin relaxation, pure dephasing, and thermally activated excitation. Within this framework we derive the entropy balance, identify entropy flux and non-negative entropy production, and examine how spin-vibrational hybridization redistributes irreversibility between coherent exchange and dissipative channels. We show that magnetic-gradient-enhanced spin-phonon coupling, resonant driving, and moderate thermal occupation produce crossovers between oscillator-dominated and spin-dominated entropy-production regimes. The framework provides a basis for using CNT-PEF hybrids as nanoscale platforms to study nonequilibrium quantum thermodynamics, decoherence, and information loss in vibrational environments.

AI.tldr: 本文研究碳纳米管-富勒烯混合体系中自旋与机械振子耦合的不可逆性与信息流，建立了结合驱动量子布朗运动与Jaynes-Cummings相互作用的开放系统模型，推导了熵平衡方程，揭示了自旋-振动杂化在相干交换与耗散通道间重新分配不可逆性的机制。
AI.motivation: 利用碳纳米管-富勒烯混合架构作为可控平台，研究结构化量子环境中的不可逆性与信息流，为理解量子热力学、退相干和振动环境中的信息损失提供理论框架。
AI.method: 构建混合开放系统模型：将CNT谐振子处理为驱动量子布朗运动（Wigner函数+高斯传播子解析演化），自旋与振动耦合采用Jaynes-Cummings模型，整体嵌入包含机械阻尼、自旋弛豫、纯退相和热激发的Lindblad主方程。
AI.result: 推导了熵平衡方程，识别了熵流与非负熵产生；发现磁梯度增强的自旋-声子耦合、共振驱动和中等热占据可产生振子主导与自旋主导熵产区域之间的交叉。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为利用CNT-PEF混合体系作为纳米级平台研究非平衡量子热力学、退相干和振动环境中的信息损失奠定了基础。

title: Reversible nanoscale patterning of WTe$_2$ with a scanning tunneling microscope
summary: Manipulating the lattice structure of ferroelectric quantum materials enables their use in low-power electronic devices, including field-effect transistors. WTe$_2$ is a Weyl-semimetal candidate and ferroelectric, both properties arising from the reduced crystal symmetry of its T$_\mathrm{d}$ ground state. The T$_\mathrm{d}$ crystal phase results from a Peierls distortion of the 1T parent structure and an interlayer shift. While experiments in WTe$_2$ have established ferroelectric switching and transient control of the predicted topological phase via ultrafast excitations, persistent electronic changes on the nanometer scale remain elusive. Here, we demonstrate that current pulses applied via scanning tunneling microscopy can both write and erase persistent nanometer-scale patterns on the surface of WTe$_2$. These patterns consist of apparent picometer in-plane and out-of-plane atomic displacements, accompanied by changes to the local density of states. The out-of-plane displacements further modulate the Peierls-like distortion present in WTe$_2$, while the in-plane displacements are indicative of ferroelectric switching. The induced patterns can be repositioned and erased, suggesting a nanoscale handle on the ferroelectric properties of WTe$_2$.

AI.tldr: 本文展示通过扫描隧道显微镜的电流脉冲可以在WTe₂表面写入和擦除具有皮米级原子位移的纳米尺度图案，实现对铁电性质和Peierls畸变的可逆操控。
AI.motivation: WTe₂因T_d相的低晶格对称性同时具有Weyl半金属和铁电性，但此前缺乏对其表面持久性纳米尺度电子态变化的操控手段。
AI.method: 利用扫描隧道显微镜的电流脉冲，在WTe₂表面写入/擦除纳米图案；结合原子位移分析（面内和面外）与局域态密度测量表征其结构及电子态变化。
AI.result: 电流脉冲使WTe₂表面产生皮米级的面内和面外原子位移；面外位移调制了Peierls畸变，面内位移指示铁电开关；图案可重新定位和擦除。
AI.conclusion: 实现了WTe₂表面铁电性质的纳米尺度可逆操控，为基于铁电量子材料的低功耗纳米电子器件提供了新途径。

title: Lieb-Schultz-Mattis constraints for hyperbolic lattices
summary: The Lieb-Schultz-Mattis (LSM) theorem and its higher-dimensional extensions forbid the existence of a unique, symmetric, and gapped ground state at fractional fillings in quantum many-body systems with a conserved particle number (or spin angular momentum) and the conventional translation symmetry of Euclidean lattices. In this work, we propose a generalization of the LSM theorem to quantum many-body systems on hyperbolic lattices, i.e., regular tessellations of two-dimensional negatively curved space. By leveraging concepts from hyperbolic band theory in a many-body setting, we adapt Oshikawa's flux-threading argument to periodic hyperbolic lattices with a non-Euclidean (Fuchsian) translation symmetry and compute a lower-bound to the ground-state degeneracy as a function of filling and lattice geometry. We explore the consequences of LSM constraints for gapped phases of hyperbolic quantum matter and suggest frustrated spin models on hyperbolic analogs of the square and triangular lattices as promising platforms for realizing symmetric spin liquids in hyperbolic space.

AI.tldr: 本文推广Lieb-Schultz-Mattis定理到双曲晶格（负曲率二维空间的正则镶嵌），通过将双曲能带论用于多体系统，利用Oshikawa的通量穿针引线论证，推导了填充因子和晶格几何对基态简并度的下界，并探讨了对双曲量子物质有能隙相的意义，指出双曲方晶格和三角晶格上的阻挫自旋模型可能是实现双曲空间自旋液体的有前景平台。
AI.motivation: 将LSM定理从欧几里得晶格推广到双曲晶格，探索非欧几何下量子多体系统的基态简并度约束。
AI.method: 利用双曲能带论的多体推广，将Oshikawa的通量穿针引线论证适配到具有非欧几里得（Fuchsian）平移对称性的周期性双曲晶格上。
AI.result: 推导了填充因子和晶格几何对基态简并度的下界。
AI.conclusion: LSM约束对双曲量子物质有能隙相有重要影响，双曲方晶格和三角晶格的阻挫自旋模型可能是实现双曲空间自旋液体的有前景平台。

title: Critical quench dynamics of Wegner's $\mathbb{Z}_2$ gauge model: a geometric perspective
summary: Wegner's $\mathbb{Z}_2$ gauge model is the earliest formulation of pure lattice gauge theory and predicts the topological nature of the confinement-deconfinement transition. In three dimensions ($D=3$), the equilibrium critical behavior of the model is understood in terms of geometrically defined objects, namely loop excitations and Fortuin-Kasteleyn (FK) clusters. This work investigates the critical quench dynamics of this model from a geometric perspective, following quenches from both a high-temperature percolation phase and the zero-temperature ground state. Using time-dependent finite-size scaling analysis, we find that the critical non-equilibrium relaxation of the percolation order parameter is governed by a dynamical exponent $z_{\rm p} \simeq 2.6$, consistent with that associated with the energy density, $z_{\rm c}$. Importantly, the value of $z_{\rm p}$ is robust with respect to the initial quench condition and the choice of geometrical objects. Furthermore, we provide a detailed characterization of the kinetics of different geometrical objects during the evolution from the percolation phase. Notably, we observe that the quench dynamics obeys dynamic scaling in terms of a growing lengthscale, $ξ_{\rm p}(t) \sim t^{1/z_{\rm p}}$, despite the absence of a local order parameter.

AI.tldr: 本文利用几何方法系统研究了三维Wegner Z₂规范模型在非平衡淬火动力学中的临界行为，发现渗透序参量的动力学临界指数zp≈2.6，与能量密度的临界指数一致，且该指数对初始条件和几何对象选择具有鲁棒性，并揭示了基于增长长度尺度的动态标度关系。
AI.motivation: 该模型是纯格点规范理论的最早表述，能够预测禁闭-退禁闭转变的拓扑本质。已有研究从平衡态角度通过几何对象（环激发和Fortuin-Kasteleyn簇）理解了其临界行为，但非平衡淬火动力学中的几何视角尚未被探索，激发本文的系统研究。
AI.method: 采用时间依赖的有限尺寸标度分析，研究从高温渗透相和零温基态两种初始条件淬火后的临界动力学。通过追踪不同几何对象的演化，计算渗透序参量的动力学临界指数zp，并与能量密度的临界指数zc进行对比。
AI.result: 发现动力学临界指数zp≈2.6，与zc一致；该指数对初始条件和几何对象的选择具有鲁棒性；尽管缺乏局部序参量，淬火动力学仍遵循增长长度尺度ξp(t)∼t^{1/zp}的动态标度。
AI.conclusion: 几何视角能为理解Wegner Z₂规范模型的非平衡临界动力学提供有效描述，渗透序参量的临界行为与能量密度耦合，且动态标度关系在全局对称性破缺缺失的情况下仍然成立。

title: Quantum Geometry-Driven Nonlinear Spin Currents in Floquet Non-Hermitian Altermagnets
summary: Altermagnets are rapidly emerging as a highly promising platform for spintronics, yet dynamically controlling their spin responses remains a fundamental challenge. In this work, we demonstrate that introducing periodic optical driving and non-Hermiticity provides a powerful route to achieve tunable control over these systems. We derive a general analytical expression for nonlinear spin currents in non-Hermitian phases with a spectral line gap, revealing that the intrinsic response cleanly separates into quantum metric, Berry curvature, and Berry connection dipole contributions. Applying this formalism to a Floquet non-Hermitian $d$-wave altermagnet, we uncover that the nonlinear spin conductivity is overwhelmingly dominated by the bare quantum metric. Furthermore, we show that the optical field's polarization can actively tune -- and even strictly reverse -- the direction of both longitudinal and transverse spin currents. Our work establishes a quantum geometric framework for the optical manipulation of nonlinear spin transport in advanced magnetic materials.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了通过周期性光学驱动和非厄米性可以实现对交错磁体自旋响应的可调控制，推导了非厄米相中非线性自旋电流的解析表达式，发现其内在响应可分解为量子度量、贝里曲率和贝里连接偶极子贡献。在Floquet非厄米d波交错磁体中，非线性自旋电导率主要由量子度量主导，且光场的偏振可以主动调控甚至反转自旋电流方向。
AI.motivation: 交错磁体是自旋电子学的前沿平台，但动态控制其自旋响应仍是一个根本性挑战。作者旨在通过引入周期性光学驱动和非厄米性来解决这一问题。
AI.method: 推导了谱线间隙非厄米相中非线性自旋电流的通用解析表达式，将内在响应分解为量子度量、贝里曲率和贝里连接偶极子贡献，并将其应用于Floquet非厄米d波交错磁体模型。
AI.result: 非线性自旋电导率主要由裸量子度量贡献主导；光场的偏振可以主动调谐甚至严格反转纵向和横向自旋电流的方向。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立了用于先进磁性材料中非线性自旋输运光学操控的量子几何框架。

title: p-Wave Orbital Angular Momentum Texture in a Chiral Crystal
summary: The spin and orbital angular momentum (SAM and OAM) are conceptually analogous, yet their roles in condensed matter systems have not been often treated on equal footing. While SAM has been extensively explored, OAM has long been regarded as quenched in crystalline environments and thus largely overlooked. Recent experimental and theoretical advances, however, have demonstrated that OAM can drive a variety of novel electronic phenomena, highlighting the importance of probing OAM textures in the electronic band structure. Here, we investigate the momentum-space OAM texture of (TaSe4)2I, a one-dimensional chiral crystal. Using circular-dichroism angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (CD-ARPES), we uncover a p-wave OAM texture accompanied by OAM dipole structures. This orbital p-wave texture is intimately connected to, and thus controllable by the chirality of the host lattice. Complementary spin-resolved ARPES measurements and first-principles calculations reveal that the OAM polarization overwhelmingly dominates the low-energy electronic properties of (TaSe4)2I, far exceeding the SAM polarization. These observations represent the experimental verification of a new type of OAM texture in crystalline materials. Most importantly, these findings underscore a promising material platform for spinless orbitronics applications and lay the foundation for realizing multipolar OAM textures-orbital counterparts of the spin texture in unconventional magnets.

AI.tldr: 本文利用圆二色性角分辨光电子能谱（CD-ARPES）在单相手性晶体(TaSe4)2I中发现了动量空间中的p波轨道角动量（OAM）纹理，并证实其与晶体的手性密切相关，且OAM极化远超自旋角动量（SAM）极化，为无自旋轨道电子学应用提供了新材料平台。
AI.motivation: 尽管自旋角动量（SAM）已被广泛研究，轨道角动量（OAM）在晶体环境中长期被认为被淬灭而遭到忽视。近年来研究表明OAM可驱动多种新奇电子现象，因此亟需对能带结构中的OAM纹理进行实验探测。
AI.method: 采用圆二色性角分辨光电子能谱（CD-ARPES）探测(TaSe4)2I的动量空间OAM纹理，辅以自旋分辨ARPES测量和第一性原理计算进行验证。
AI.result: 发现了p波OAM纹理及OAM偶极结构；OAM极化在低能电子性质中占绝对主导地位，远超SAM极化；OAM纹理与晶格手性紧密关联并可受其调控。
AI.conclusion: 该工作首次实验验证了晶体材料中新型OAM纹理的存在，为无自旋轨道电子学（轨道电子学）应用提供了潜在材料平台，并为实现多极OAM纹理（对应非常规磁体中的自旋纹理的轨道类似物）奠定了基础。

title: Charge-sensitive vibrational modes in BEDT-TTF salts: Signatures of charge ordering and site charge
summary: BEDT-TTF-based organic conductors host a number of ground states, tuned by electron repulsion from Mott and charge ordered insulators to superconductors. Knowing charge distribution on the molecular sites in the insulating state of these materials is a key to understanding the origin of these ground states. We survey and discuss the C=C stretching modes in BEDT-TTF based molecular conductors. These molecular vibrations are extremely crucial in characterization of charge-ordered insulators, and are recently linked to superconductivity in some compounds. Focusing on the known examples of BEDT-TTF$^{+0.5}$ salts, we analyse the reliability of the C=C stretching modes for the determination of charge ordering and absolute site charge. Considering the charge-ordered states, a prominent shift in frequency of 141 cm$^{-1}$ per elementary charge $e$ for $ν_{27}(b_{1u})$ and 98 cm$^{-1}$$e$ for $ν_2$($a_g$) can be clearly realised, however, the distribution resulting from different compounds span over 20 cm$^{-1}$. For nominal BEDT-TTF$^{+0.5}$ compounds, the distribution of the resonance also extends around 20 cm$^{-1}$, yielding an unexpected large uncertainty of $Δρ~\approx~(~\pm~0.045)e$, which is presumably due to the influence of small differences in the structure. This highlights the limitations of charge-frequency relations to detect small deviations in absolute charge values on molecular lattice sites, and emphasises on the use of the relations to estimate charge-ordering, rather than absolute site charge.

AI.tldr: 本文系统调查了BEDT-TTF基有机导体中C=C伸缩振动模式，分析了其对电荷有序绝缘体和超导体的表征意义，发现电荷-频率关系在确定绝对位点电荷时存在约±0.045e的较大不确定性，强调了该方法更适合用于估计电荷有序性而非绝对电荷值。
AI.motivation: BEDT-TTF基有机导体存在多种基态（从Mott绝缘体、电荷有序绝缘体到超导体），了解绝缘态分子位点上的电荷分布是理解这些基态起源的关键。C=C伸缩振动模式对电荷有序绝缘体的表征至关重要，且近期被发现与某些化合物的超导电性相关。
AI.method: 系统调查BEDT-TTF基分子导体中的C=C伸缩振动模式，重点分析已知BEDT-TTF$^{+0.5}$盐的例子，评估C=C伸缩振动模式在确定电荷有序性和绝对位点电荷方面的可靠性。
AI.result: 电荷有序状态下，ν₂₇(b₁u)和ν₂(a_g)模式分别展现出141 cm⁻¹/e和98 cm⁻¹/e的明显频移，但不同化合物间的频散范围超过20 cm⁻¹。标称BEDT-TTF$^{+0.5}$化合物的共振分布也延伸约20 cm⁻¹，导致Δρ≈(±0.045)e的意外大不确定性，推测源于结构微小差异的影响。
AI.conclusion: 电荷-频率关系在检测分子晶格位点上绝对电荷值的微小偏差时存在局限性，应更适用于估计电荷有序性而非绝对位点电荷。

title: Cycle affinity and winding localize eigenvalues of Markov generators
summary: The complex eigenvalues of Markov generators govern oscillatory properties of relaxation, autocorrelation, and linear response. Here we show that these eigenvalues are localized by nonequilibrium cycles of the generator, thus revealing a fundamental tradeoff between thermodynamic driving, oscillation, and decay of eigenmodes. Specifically, we prove that each complex eigenvalue is confined to a region determined by the cycle affinity and the eigenvector ``winding number'' of some nonequilibrium cycle. In unicyclic systems, we also demonstrate that the winding number coincides with the ordered eigenvalue index, yielding new thermodynamic bounds on the slowest and fastest relaxation modes. In multicyclic systems, our approach unifies and extends several previous inequalities and proves the Uhl--Seifert ellipse conjecture.

AI.tldr: 本文证明马尔可夫生成器的复本征值被非平衡循环局域化，揭示了热力学驱动、振荡和衰减之间的基本权衡关系，并在单循环系统中建立了绕数与有序本征值指数的联系，在多循环系统中统一并扩展了多个不等式并证明了Uhl-Seifert椭圆猜想。
AI.motivation: 理解马尔可夫生成器的复本征值如何控制弛豫、自相关和线性响应的振荡特性，并揭示热力学驱动力与动力学模式之间的深层联系。
AI.method: 通过理论分析证明每个复本征值被限制在由循环亲和势和本征矢"绕数"决定的区域内；在单循环系统中证明绕数与有序本征值指数一致；在多循环系统中统一并扩展已有不等式。
AI.result: 发现了复本征值的局域化规律，建立了热力学驱动与振荡/衰减之间的定量界限，证明了Uhl-Seifert椭圆猜想。
AI.conclusion: 非平衡循环对马尔可夫生成器的复本征值具有局域化作用，揭示了热力学驱动与动力学特性间的基本权衡关系。

title: Topological property of graphene with triangular array of nanoholes
summary: The nontrivial band topology for graphene with regular arrays of nanoholes with $C_{6v}$ symmetry is investigated theoretically. For the case of $3\sqrt{3} \times 3\sqrt{3}$ triangular array of nanoholes, we find an energy gap at $Γ$ point around the Fermi level associated with a band inversion which induces change in parity indices, whereas deep below the Fermi level there are a bunch of valence bands characterized as obstructed atomic limit (OAL) which also accommodate imbalance in parity indices. This band structure renders the gap at the Fermi level topologically trivial and carrying no edge states, while the nontrivial band topology of the OAL manifests in two flat bands in the ribbon structure associated with localized electronic states at ribbon edges. The present results exhibit rich topological behaviors in graphene derivatives waiting for explorations.

AI.tldr: 本文理论上研究了具有C6v对称性规则纳米孔阵列的石墨烯的非平庸能带拓扑。发现3√3×3√3三角形纳米孔阵列在费米能级附近Γ点存在能隙，伴随能带反转和宇称指标变化；而费米能级深处则存在阻碍原子极限（OAL）价带，同样具有宇称指标不平衡。费米能级处的能隙拓扑平庸且无边缘态，而OAL的非平庸拓扑则在 ribbons 结构中表现为两个平带和局域化的边缘态。
AI.motivation: 探索具有C6v对称性规则纳米孔阵列的石墨烯中的非平庸能带拓扑行为，揭示其丰富的拓扑特性。
AI.method: 理论分析，通过研究3√3×3√3三角形纳米孔阵列的能带结构，分析能带反转、宇称指标变化以及阻碍原子极限（OAL）等拓扑性质。
AI.result: 在费米能级处Γ点出现能隙、能带反转和宇称指标变化，但该能隙拓扑平庸无边缘态；而深能级处的OAL价带具有非平庸拓扑，在 ribbons 结构中产生两个平带和局域化边缘态。
AI.conclusion: 石墨烯衍生物中蕴含着丰富的拓扑行为，有待进一步探索。

title: Local distortions as a source of piezoelectric/stiffness decoupling in B-doped AlScN
summary: We present a first-principles analysis of the wurtzite pseudo-ternary (Al,Sc,B)N to elucidate the structural origin of a decoupling between stiffness $C_{33}$ and piezoelectric response $e_{33}$ upon boron incorporation, using DFT-relaxed 100-atom special quasirandom structures across a broad composition range. Pair distribution function analysis reveals interstitial threefold-coordinated boron atoms that have displaced from the tetrahedral cation site. Direct structural analysis establishes their preferential orientation along the $c$-axis and identifies a scandium-activated creation mechanism. The vertical coordination asymmetry of each cation is quantified through a site-specific axial asymmetry ratio (AAR), showing that boron incorporation progressively symmetrizes the Sc environment. Correlation with Born effective charges demonstrates that this symmetrization is the mechanism behind the piezoelectric enhancement.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算分析(Al,Sc,B)N伪三元体系，发现硼掺入后B原子从四面体位点位移至c轴取向的三重配位间隙位，揭示Sc激活的B迁移机制；通过轴向不对称比(AAR)量化阳离子配位不对称性，证明B掺入使Sc环境对称化，进而增强压电响应e33，实现刚度C33与压电响应的解耦。
AI.motivation: 探究(Al,Sc,B)N体系中B掺入导致刚度C33与压电响应e33之间解耦的结构起源。
AI.method: 采用DFT弛豫的100原子特殊准随机结构(SQS)，结合对分布函数(PDF)分析和轴向不对称比(AAR)量化，分析Born有效电荷与结构对称性的关联。
AI.result: 发现B原子从四面体阳离子位点位移至c轴取向的三重配位间隙位；Sc环境随B掺入逐渐对称化；该对称化是压电增强的机制。
AI.conclusion: B掺入通过Sc环境对称化增强压电响应，揭示了刚度-压电解耦的结构机制。

title: Spherically symmetric approaches in the theoretical study of low-dimensional magnets
summary: The main ideas and some of the most important results of the spherically symmetric self-consistent approach and a number of related theoretical algorithms are presented. These methods make it possible to study low-dimensional Heisenberg-type spin models, including frustrated ones, with careful consideration of the theoretic (Mermin-Wagner and Marshall) theorems, as well as the site spin constraint. Thus, the difficulties that may arise in the traditional analysis of low-dimensional magnetic systems are avoided. The approach can also be applied to the spin-pseudospin model, and is also embedded in more complex constructions when considering spin models with free carriers, such as the basic and three-band Hubbard models, t-J and s-d models, and the Kondo lattice.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了球对称自洽方法及其相关算法，用于研究低维海森堡型自旋模型（包括阻挫系统），严格遵循Mermin-Wagner、Marshall定理及自旋约束，避免传统分析中的困难，并可推广至自旋-赝自旋模型及含自由载流子的复杂模型（如Hubbard、t-J、s-d模型及Kondo晶格）。
AI.motivation: 传统方法分析低维磁性系统时，难以兼顾Mermin-Wagner定理、Marshall定理以及自旋位点约束，导致理论困难。本文旨在提出一种能严格遵循这些定理和约束的球对称自洽方法，以更准确地研究低维自旋模型，包括阻挫系统。
AI.method: 采用球对称自洽方法（spherically symmetric self-consistent approach），并结合一系列相关理论算法，在计算中严格处理Mermin-Wagner定理、Marshall定理以及自旋约束条件。该方法还可嵌入更复杂的框架中，用于处理含自由载流子的模型。
AI.result: 成功实现了对低维海森堡型自旋模型（含阻挫系统）的理论分析，避免了传统方法中因忽视理论定理和自旋约束而导致的困难。该方法还能推广至自旋-赝自旋模型及Hubbard、t-J、s-d、Kondo晶格等复杂模型。
AI.conclusion: 球对称自洽方法是一种有效的工具，能够严格满足低维磁性系统的理论约束，为研究多种自旋模型及含自由载流子的复杂模型提供了可靠的理论框架。

title: The Directed Abelian Sandpile Model on Cylinders
summary: We study the abelian sandpile model in two dimensions on a directed cylindrical lattice with periodic transverse boundary conditions in the transverse direction and dissipation at one boundary. Recurrent configurations form a finite abelian group, and repeated grain addition at a specific site generates deterministic dynamics on this group. Using Dhar's formulation, the sandpile group is identified with the co-kernel of the reduced directed Laplacian. We show that the group structure admits an exact reduction to a transverse problem, allowing complete determination of its cyclic decomposition. Our results establish a direct connection between the algebraic structure of the sandpile group and the periodicity of the driven dynamics, establishing the manner in which the underlying algebraic structure governs both deterministic and stochastic evolution in directed sandpile.

AI.tldr: 本文研究二维有向圆柱晶格上的阿贝尔沙堆模型，证明了其沙堆群的循环分解可通过横向问题精确约化，并建立了代数结构与驱动动力学周期性之间的直接联系。
AI.motivation: 理解有向沙堆模型中代数结构（沙堆群）如何控制确定性及随机演化动力学，特别是群结构与驱动动力学周期性之间的内在联系。
AI.method: 利用Dhar公式将沙堆群等同于有向拉普拉斯算子的余核，通过将群结构精确约化为横向问题，从而完全确定其循环分解。
AI.result: 成功实现了沙堆群结构到横向问题的精确约化，完整确定了群结构的循环分解，并建立了代数结构与驱动动力学周期性之间的直接联系。
AI.conclusion: 有向沙堆模型中的底层代数结构（沙堆群）同时控制着确定性演化和随机演化的周期性行为。

title: Stable magnetic nanodomains engineered via Ga+-ion irradiation for deterministic sequential switching
comment: 13 pages main text, 6 figures, 5 pages S.I., 3 supplementary figures, Partially presented at INTERMAG 2026
summary: Precise control of magnetic domain formation at the nanoscale remains constrained by stochastic defect-mediated and unstable pinning, limiting scalability and reproducibility in spintronic architectures. Here we demonstrate that spatially engineered anisotropy gradients provide a deterministic alternative. Using focused Ga+-ion irradiation, we pattern magnetic energy landscapes containing nanoscale "anisotropy wells" that confine magnetic domain walls and enable bidirectional sequential switching without reliance on difficult-to-control material disorder. An analytical framework describing domain-wall energetics in graded anisotropy profiles yields predictive design rules for depinning and stability, which are supported by micromagnetic simulations and experiments. We realize programmable multi-domain configurations in continuous ferromagnetic films and demonstrate robust, reproducible switching of 750 nm regions, while first results for 100 nm are shown, approaching the theoretical limit set by the domain-wall width. By replacing unstable pinning with engineered energy landscapes, this anisotropy landscape establishes a scalable materials strategy for deterministic magnetic-state programming and opens a pathway toward dense, energy-efficient spintronic and reconfigurable magnetic nanodevices.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用聚焦Ga+离子辐照构建各向异性梯度，在连续铁磁薄膜中实现纳米级磁性畴壁的确定性钉扎和可控翻转，展示了750nm（初步100nm）区域的可编程多畴配置，为自旋电子器件提供了可扩展的磁态编程策略。
AI.motivation: 纳米尺度磁畴形成的精确控制受限于随机缺陷介导和不稳定钉扎，制约了自旋电子架构的可扩展性和可重复性，亟需一种确定性的替代方案。
AI.method: 采用聚焦Ga+离子辐照对磁性能量景观进行图案化，构建包含纳米级"各向异性阱"的梯度各向异性分布；建立描述梯度各向异性中畴壁能量学的分析框架，结合微磁模拟和实验验证。
AI.result: 实现了连续铁磁薄膜中可编程多畴配置，展示了750nm区域的鲁棒可重复翻转，100nm区域初步结果接近畴壁宽度的理论极限。
AI.conclusion: 用工程化能量景观替代不稳定钉扎，为确定性磁态编程提供了可扩展的材料策略，为高密度、低能耗自旋电子和可重构磁性纳米器件开辟了新路径。

title: Benchmarking empirical and machine-learned interatomic potentials using phase diagram predictions for Lead
summary: We compare the predicted phase behaviour of lead (Pb) using three different interatomic potential models, including an embedded atom method (EAM), a modified embedded atom method (MEAM), and a neural network-based machine-learned model in the form of an ephemeral data-derived potential (EDDP). Using nested sampling and replica-exchange nested sampling simulations, we computed thermodynamic and structural properties at pressures up to 60 GPa, mapping both melting behaviour and solid-phase stability. Both the EAM and MEAM models predict the face-centred cubic (FCC) phase to remain stable up to approximately 60 GPa. In contrast, the EDDP model captures the experimentally-observed FCC-to-hexagonal close-packed (HCP) transition at around 15 GPa. These results highlight the importance of training data and model flexibility in accurately describing high-pressure phase behaviour, and demonstrate the effectiveness of nested sampling as a robust framework for exploring phase stability in materials. Particularly, the combination of nested sampling with modern machine-learned interatomic potentials - delivering near ab initio accuracy at tractable cost - opens the door to truly predictive and exhaustive exploration. EDDPs trained on diverse, out-of-equilibrium configurations appear particularly well suited to this task, offering a robust and transferable framework for unbiased phase discovery.

AI.tldr: 本文利用三种原子间势模型（EAM、MEAM和基于机器学习的EDDP），结合嵌套采样方法，预测了铅（Pb）在高达60 GPa压力下的相行为。结果显示，只有EDDP模型成功捕捉到了实验观测到的FCC到HCP相变，凸显了机器学习势在高压相变预测中的优势。
AI.motivation: 比较不同原子间势模型（经典势 vs. 机器学习势）在预测高压相行为方面的准确性，验证嵌套采样方法结合机器学习势在材料相变探索中的有效性。
AI.method: 使用EAM、MEAM和基于神经网络的EDDP三种原子间势模型，结合嵌套采样和副本交换嵌套采样模拟，在0-60 GPa压力范围内计算铅的热力学和结构性质。
AI.result: EAM和MEAM均预测FCC相在高达60 GPa时仍保持稳定，而EDDP成功捕捉到实验上观测到的FCC到HCP相变（约15 GPa），与实验吻合。
AI.conclusion: 训练数据的多样性和模型的灵活性对准确描述高压相行为至关重要；嵌套采样结合机器学习势（尤其是EDDP）为实现高精度、可转移、无偏的相发现提供了有力框架。

title: Lattice Relaxation Flattens Chern Bands in Rhombohedral Graphene Stacks
summary: Motivated by recent observations of integer and fractional Chern insulators in rhombohedral graphene stacks aligned with hexagonal boron nitride (hBN), we propose and study a model in which the moiré potential is defined by the pattern of layer-shear strain fields produced by lattice relaxation in these heterostructures. Although these strain fields decrease exponentially with the number of layers, their imprints on electrons residing away from the contact layer are non-negligible. In the absence of a displacement field, lattice relaxation effects amplify the electronic differences among the two different stackings with hBN. These differences, although attenuated at the single-electron level, survive in the so-called moiré-distant regime and are further enhanced with the inclusion of electron interactions. We find that lattice relaxation plays a crucial role in flattening and isolating a valley-polarized Hartree-Fock electron band with $|C|=1$ Chern number. Our results challenge the conventional wisdom on moiré effects in these heterostructures by illustrating the intertwined effects of long-range Coulomb interactions and lattice relaxation, and opens the door to explore different regimes of twist angles and displacement fields for the search for topological states.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了菱方石墨烯/六方氮化硼异质结中晶格弛豫产生的层剪切应变场对莫尔势的影响，发现晶格弛豫对平带和拓扑态的形成起关键作用，挑战了传统莫尔效应的认知。
AI.motivation: 受近期在菱方石墨烯/hBN异质结中观测到整数和分数量子反常霍尔效应的启发，作者希望理解晶格弛豫产生的应变场如何影响电子结构，并揭示长程库仑相互作用与晶格弛豫的耦合机制。
AI.method: 构建了由层剪切应变场定义莫尔势的理论模型，在无位移场条件下分析晶格弛豫对两种hBN堆叠方式的电子差异影响，并通过Hartree-Fock方法计入电子相互作用。
AI.result: 发现：(1) 应变场随层数指数衰减，但对远离接触层的电子仍有不可忽略的影响；(2) 晶格弛豫放大了两种hBN堆叠的电子差异，且在莫尔远程区仍然存在；(3) 相互作用进一步增强这些差异；(4) 晶格弛豫对形成陈数为1的谷极化Hartree-Fock平带至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 该工作挑战了传统观点，展示了长程库仑相互作用与晶格弛豫的耦合效应，为通过调控扭转角和位移场寻找拓扑态开辟了新方向。

title: Bak--Tang--Wiesenfeld model for various topologies and ranges of interaction
comment: 7 pages, 5 figures, for International Conference on Statistical Physics, SigmaPhi 2026, <http://sigmaphisrv.polito.it/>
summary: In this paper, the Bak--Tang--Wiesenfeld model for various substrate topologies and a variety of neighborhoods is reconsidered. With computer simulation, we study the distribution of avalanche sizes. Using the Z-score we confirm that independently of the substrate topology and the range of neighborhood, the exponent that governs the power law of the probability distribution of the size of avalanches is the same and approximately equal 1.208(39). However, this requires a smartly chosen number of deposited grains in relation to the linear size of the system.

AI.tldr: 本文通过计算机模拟重新审视了Bak-Tang-Wiesenfeld模型在不同基底拓扑和邻域范围下的雪崩分布。利用Z-score验证了雪崩大小概率分布的幂律指数约为1.208(39)，与拓扑和邻域无关，但需要智慧地选择与系统线性尺寸相关的沉积颗粒数。
AI.motivation: 探究Bak-Tang-Wiesenfeld模型中雪崩大小分布的幂律指数是否在不同基底拓扑和邻域范围下具有普适性。
AI.method: 通过计算机模拟Bak-Tang-Wiesenfeld模型在不同基底拓扑和邻域范围下的行为，利用Z-score统计分析雪崩大小的概率分布。
AI.result: 独立于基底拓扑和邻域范围，雪崩大小分布的幂律指数约为1.208(39)。
AI.conclusion: 幂律指数具有普适性，但需要智慧选择与系统线性尺寸相关的沉积颗粒数。

title: Interfacial Reconstructions and Engineering in III-V@II-VI Core-Shell Quantum Dots
summary: In core/shell quantum dots (QDs), the interface between semiconductors of different chemical character largely determines their optoelectronic properties. In III-V/II-VI systems, this boundary involves pronounced chemical and electronic discontinuities that can generate trap states even under complete surface passivation. Using density functional theory on atomistic models of InAs/CdSe QDs, we systematically reconstruct atomic arrangements at the surface and interface to evaluate how local coordination and interfacial dipoles influence the electronic structure. Abrupt interfaces induce charge imbalance and band-gap collapse, whereas introducing an alloyed interlayer that mixes core and shell atoms and vacancies restores energetic alignment and yields delocalized band-edge states, consistent with experimental findings. We also introduce a charge-flow analysis that quantifies charge redistribution across the QD, providing a framework for realistic modeling of interlayer formation and predictive design of defect-free interfaces in core@shell architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算，系统研究了InAs/CdSe核/壳量子点中界面结构和组分对电子性质的影响，发现引入合金化中间层可以消除界面缺陷、恢复能带对齐，并提出了电荷流分析方法用于预测性设计。
AI.motivation: III-V/II-VI核/壳量子点界面处存在化学和电子不连续性，即使完全钝化表面也会产生陷阱态，影响光电器件性能，亟需理解界面原子构型如何影响电子结构。
AI.method: 采用密度泛函理论（DFT），在原子级模型中系统重构InAs/CdSe量子点的表面和界面原子排列，评估局部配位和界面偶极对电子结构的影响，并引入电荷流分析方法量化电荷重分布。
AI.result: 突变界面导致电荷不平衡和带隙坍塌；而引入混合核/壳原子和空位的合金化中间层可恢复能带对齐，产生离域的带边态，与实验一致。
AI.conclusion: 合金化中间层是消除界面缺陷的关键，所提出的电荷流分析框架可用于预测性设计无缺陷核/壳量子点界面。

title: Staggering domino-like blast front motion in a one-dimensional cold gas
summary: One-dimensional alternating particle systems are widely used to study interconnections between the hydrodynamics of blast waves in a gas-like medium and the Newtonian dynamics of its corpuscular constituents. We study the model in which point particles with masses $m,μ, m,μ,\dots, (m\geqμ)$ are distributed on the positive half-line $\mathbb{R}_{+}$. Their dynamics are initiated by giving a positive velocity to the leftmost particle; in its course, the particles undergo elastic collisions. For this model with $m/μ=2$, it has previously been established that the dynamics that start from random initial positions are consistent with predictions based on Euler's hydrodynamic equation. In particular, they have the following properties: (i) the position of the rightmost particle (shock front) evolves as $t^δ$ with $δ<1$; (ii) recoiled particles behind the front enter the negative half-axis; (iii) particles with locations $x\leq0$ move ballistically and eventually take over the total energy of the system. In this paper, we present numerical and analytical results for the dynamics of this model with nonrandom (typically equidistant) initial positions and various values of $m/μ$. For $m/μ=2$ and equidistant initial positions, our results qualitatively agree with those just mentioned. At the same time, we found an infinite family of numbers $\{\mathcal{M}_k\}$ such that, for $m/μ=\mathcal{M}_k$, the hydrodynamic behavior mentioned changes drastically to the following. At each moment, only a single triplet $m,μ, m$ is in motion, whereas all other particles are at rest. As a result, the shock front moves ballistically with an average velocity equal to the initial one. Such a `staggering domino-like' picture is obtained as an exact solution, which yields, in particular, explicit formulas for $\mathcal{M}_k$ and the particle velocities and positions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究一维交替粒子系统（质量比为m/μ）的动力学行为。对于m/μ=2且随机初始位置，结果与欧拉流体动力学预测一致：冲击波以次弹道速度传播，反冲粒子进入负半轴并最终带走全部能量。但当m/μ取特定值序列{M_k}时，系统呈现精确的"多米诺骨牌"式解：每次仅一个三重态(m,μ,m)运动，其余粒子静止，冲击波以初始速度弹道传播。
AI.motivation: 探究一维交替粒子系统中质量比m/μ对冲击波传播动力学的影响，特别是寻找流体力学行为失效、系统呈现完全可解动力学的情形。
AI.method: 理论分析与数值模拟相结合。通过分析弹性碰撞动力学，求解特定质量比下粒子运动方程的精确解，并识别出无限族特殊质量比{M_k}。
AI.result: 1）对于m/μ=2且等距初始位置，结果与随机初始位置定性一致；2）发现无限族特殊质量比{M_k}，此时系统呈现"交错多米诺骨牌"式精确解：每次仅一个粒子三重态运动，其余静止；3）冲击波以弹道方式传播，平均速度等于初始速度。
AI.conclusion: 存在无限个特殊质量比使得原本流体力学描述的系统退化为完全可解的弹道传播模式，揭示了质量比对粒子系统动力学行为的决定性影响。

title: Orbital Angular Momentum Textures and Currents in a Discrete Helix: Equilibrium and Linear Response
summary: Recently, nonequilibrium orbital angular momentum in low-dimensional systems has attracted renewed attention. Here we introduce a minimal three-orbital tight-binding model for a single helical chain and show that chirality alone generates a momentum-dependent orbital-angular-momentum texture through Slater--Koster hybridization in the local basis $(p_r,p_φ,p_z)$, without requiring atomic spin--orbit coupling. In the single-helix geometry, the radial orbital texture vanishes identically, while the azimuthal and longitudinal components remain finite and arise from the odd-in-momentum $(p_z,p_r)$ and $(p_r,p_φ)$ sectors. As a result, the equilibrium average orbital texture vanishes by parity, although persistent-like orbital angular momentum currents may still exist and imply chirality-dependent end magnetization in a finite helix. Under an applied longitudinal electric field, the system develops a finite orbital Edelstein response, whereas the projected longitudinal orbital-current conductivity vanishes in the linear regime by parity. When spin degrees of freedom are included, the orbital texture acts as a source of spin polarization through orbital-to-spin transduction. The resulting spin response is controlled by orbital overlap scales much larger than the bare relativistic spin--orbit scale, making it a stronger candidate for spin injection than the conventional spin Edelstein mechanism. These results identify chirality as the minimal microscopic ingredient for generating orbital angular momentum response in one-dimensional systems and support an orbital route to spin selectivity in chiral conductors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个最小三轨道紧束缚模型，证明在单螺旋链中，仅凭手性就能通过Slater-Koster杂化产生动量依赖的轨道角动量纹理，无需自旋-轨道耦合。该轨道纹理在平衡态下平均为零，但在电场下产生轨道Edelstein效应；加入自旋后，轨道纹理通过更大的轨道重叠尺度转化为自旋极化，为手性诱导自旋选择性提供了新机制。
AI.motivation: 近年来低维系统中的非平衡轨道角动量引起关注，作者希望探究手性本身是否足以产生轨道角动量响应，而不依赖传统的自旋-轨道耦合机制，并揭示其作为手性诱导自旋选择性的微观起源。
AI.method: 构建最小三轨道紧束缚模型(p_r, p_φ, p_z)描述单螺旋链，利用Slater-Koster杂化分析轨道纹理的动量依赖结构，并在电场下计算轨道Edelstein响应及自旋极化效应。
AI.result: 径向轨道纹理恒为零，方位角和纵向轨道纹理有限且为动量的奇函数；平衡态平均轨道纹理为零，但存在手性依赖的类持续轨道角动量流；电场下产生有限轨道Edelstein响应，纵向轨道流电导在线性区为零；轨道纹理可转化为自旋极化，其响应尺度远大于相对论性自旋-轨道耦合尺度。
AI.conclusion: 手性是低维系统中产生轨道角动量响应的最小微观要素，为手性导体中的自旋选择性提供了一种轨道途径，且比传统自旋Edelstein机制更高效。

title: A practical Laser-Heated Diamond Anvil Cell synthesis technique and recovery workflow for metastable MnSb2 and YbZn2 phases
summary: The creation and exploration of new materials under extreme pressure-temperature conditions has become increasingly reliant on laser-heated diamond anvil cell (LHDAC) techniques, which provide direct access to previously unexplored regions of multinary phase diagrams. Whereas numerous high-pressure phases have been identified in situ, systematic recovery and post-synthesis physical property characterization of these materials remain significant challenges. In this work, we present the development of an integrated LHDAC synthesis and demonstrate a practical LHDAC-based synthesis workflow that enables stabilization and recovery of metastable intermetallic phases for subsequent structural and transport studies. Using this approach, we successfully achieved LHDAC synthesis of high-pressure MnSb2 and YbZn2 phases under moderate pressures. Synchrotron X-ray diffraction and spatial mapping confirm dominant formation of the targeted phases, whereas laboratory-based refinement quantifies phase fractions despite intrinsic microstrain and minor secondary phases. High-pressure transport measurements on recovered samples reveal tunable by pressure electronic instabilities in both systems. In MnSb2, pressure suppresses two high-temperature magnetic ordering anomalies, observed in transport, by 5 GPa and for higher pressures induces a new low-temperature feature that increases with further pressure increase. In hexagonal high-pressure YbZn2, an electronic reconstruction emerges at ~11 GPa, characterized by semiconducting-like behavior from ~ 30 K to 300 K and a broad low-temperature coherence crossover near 30 K. Our results establish LHDAC synthesis not only as a structural discovery tool, but also as an experimental platform for investigating correlated quantum states stabilized far from equilibrium thermodynamic conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种集成激光加热金刚石砧室（LHDAC）合成工作流程，成功实现了亚稳态金属间化合物MnSb₂和YbZn₂的高压合成与回收，并在回收样品中观察到可压力调控的电子不稳定性，证明了LHDAC不仅是结构发现工具，更是研究远离平衡态量子关联态的实验平台。
AI.motivation: 尽管大量高压相已通过原位手段被识别，但系统回收合成材料并进行后续物性表征仍面临重大挑战。本文旨在开发一种可行的LHDAC合成工作流程，实现亚稳态金属间化合物的稳定化回收与后续结构/输运研究。
AI.method: 提出集成LHDAC合成工作流程，在中等压力下合成高压相MnSb₂和YbZn₂；利用同步辐射X射线衍射和空间映射确认目标相；结合实验室精修定量相分数；对回收样品进行高压输运测量。
AI.result: 成功合成并回收了高压MnSb₂和YbZn₂相。MnSb₂中压力抑制了两个高温磁有序异常（~5 GPa），并在更高压下诱导出新的低温特征。六角高压YbZn₂在~11 GPa出现电子重构，表现为30 K~300 K类半导体行为及30 K附近的宽低温相干交叉。
AI.conclusion: LHDAC合成不仅是结构发现工具，更可作为研究远离平衡热力学条件下稳定的关联量子态的实验平台。

title: Near-degenerate competing magnetic orders in EuAgAs: a tunable route to altermagnetism
summary: Altermagnets (AMs) have recently emerged as a distinct magnetic class bridging central features of ferromagnets (FMs) and antiferromagnets (AFMs), offering new opportunities for spin-based electronics. While they possess zero net magnetization like collinear AFMs, they simultaneously exhibit momentum-dependent spin splitting long thought exclusive to FMs. Despite intense theoretical interest, experimentally accessible materials hosting both altermagnetism and nontrivial band topology remain scarce. EuAgAs, crystallizing in space group $P6_3/mmc$, was previously identified via density functional theory (DFT) as a bulk altermagnetic Dirac semimetal. Contrary to these predictions, our neutron diffraction experiments reveal that the bulk ground state adopts a $\mathbf{q} = (0,0,\tfrac{1}{2})$ AFM structure with an in-plane $\uparrow\uparrow\downarrow\downarrow$ spin sequence. Systematic DFT calculations, however, uncover a remarkable near-degeneracy among competing magnetic orders: the FM and AM configurations lie only $0.11$ and $0.40~\text{meV/f.u.}$ above the AFM ground state, respectively. We further show that while a simple Heisenberg model favors a spin-spiral ground state, the inclusion of non-Heisenberg biquadratic coupling stabilizes the observed commensurate AFM phase. This near-degeneracy renders the magnetic state highly tunable, with DFT predicting a transition to the altermagnetic phase under hydrostatic pressure at approximately $14 \text{ GPa}$, establishing EuAgAs as a controllable platform for accessing topological altermagnetism.

AI.tldr: EuAgAs被预测为体相交错磁狄拉克半金属，但中子衍射实验显示其基态为面内↑↑↓↓反铁磁序。DFT发现多种磁序能量高度简并，非海森堡双二次耦合稳定了观测到的反铁磁相。液压约14 GPa下可转变为交错磁相，为拓扑交错磁性提供了可控平台。
AI.motivation: 交错磁体兼具铁磁体的自旋劈裂和反铁磁体的零净磁化，但实验中兼具交错磁性和非平庸能带拓扑的材料稀缺，亟需发现可调控的平台。
AI.method: 中子衍射实验测定磁结构；DFT计算竞争磁序能量；Heisenberg模型与双二次耦合模型分析磁相稳定性；压力诱导相变预测。
AI.result: 实验确定基态为q=(0,0,1/2)面内↑↑↓↓AFM；FM和AM能量仅高出AFM 0.11和0.40 meV/f.u.；双二次耦合稳定了观测到的AFM相；约14 GPa下AM相可被激活。
AI.conclusion: EuAgAs的多种磁序能量高度简并，其磁态高度可调，是研究拓扑交错磁性的理想可控平台。

title: An agitated oscillator chain
summary: We study how the stationary dynamics of an oscillator chain is modified when coupled to a bath of run-and-tumble particles. First, assuming time-scale separation, we derive the induced Langevin chain dynamics with explicit expressions for the streaming term, friction coefficient, and noise amplitude. At high persistence of the run-and-tumble particle bath, the linear friction turns negative, creating an instability. Second, we find that this anti-damping is arrested at long times due to nonlinear effects, reminiscent of a Rayleigh oscillator. We conclude that a passive harmonic chain can be transformed by its coupling to active matter into a self-sustained fluctuating medium with many-body Rayleigh-like dynamics. That transfer of activity results in pulsations of the displacements, spatial oscillations, and the emergence of persistence in velocities along the chain.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了被动谐振子链与跑-跳粒子（run-and-tumble particles）活性浴耦合时，其稳态动力学如何被改变。研究发现，在时间尺度分离下，活性浴可诱导出具有显式表达形式的Langevin链动力学；当活性浴的持续运动性很高时，线性摩擦会变为负值，导致反阻尼失稳。但非线性效应会在长时间尺度上抑制该不稳定性，类似于Rayleigh振荡器。最终，被动链被转化为具有多体Rayleigh-like动力学特性的自持脉动介质。
AI.motivation: 理解被动谐振子链在与活性物质（run-and-tumble粒子浴）耦合时，其稳态动力学如何被改变，特别是活性浴如何将被动系统转变为具有自持振荡和脉动行为的活性介质。
AI.method: 采用时间尺度分离假设，推导出耦合系统的有效Langevin链动力学，显式给出流项、摩擦系数和噪声振幅的表达式；分析高持续运动性下线摩擦系数变负引发的反阻尼失稳；通过非线性效应（Rayleigh振荡器类比）研究失稳的长期抑制机制。
AI.result: 发现了线性摩擦系数在活性浴高持续运动性下转为负值，引发反阻尼不稳定性；但非线性效应能在长时间尺度上抑制该失稳；系统展现出位移脉动、空间振荡以及链上速度的持续运动性。
AI.conclusion: 被动谐振子链通过与活性物质的耦合可以转变为具有自持脉动的活性介质，表现出多体Rayleigh-like动力学特性。该工作揭示了"活性转移"机制，即被动系统可通过与活性浴耦合获得类似活性物质的行为特征。

title: Transport signatures of valley polarization in graphene multilayers: In-plane linear magnetoconductivity vs anomalous Hall effect
summary: In two-dimensional materials where interacting Fermi pockets occur in valleys related by time-reversal symmetry, a spontaneous valley imbalance results in a novel state known as an orbital magnet. Due to the breaking of time-reversal symmetry, this state can be probed in transport experiments by the violation of Onsager relations, most often done through the anomalous Hall effect (AHE). Here we propose that odd-in-field, in-plane linear magnetoconductivity (LMC) is an alternative probe of valley polarization which can occur even when the AHE vanishes. In multilayer structures, the effect originates from in-plane orbital moments and Berry curvatures enabled by interlayer tunneling and dominates over the spin response. After a classification of many recently studied multilayers, we focus on two valley polarized examples: twisted bilayer graphene, where LMC is finite but the AHE vanishes unless additional symmetry breaking from the substrate is present, and rhombohedral graphene multilayers, where LMC and AHE both track valley polarization because they have the same symmetry. Using self-consistent Hartree-Fock and semiclassical transport calculations, we present detailed predictions of LMR for these two examples and analyze the implications for recent experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出奇数阶面内线性磁电导（LMC）可作为谷极化探测的新手段，即使反常霍尔效应（AHE）为零时也能工作，并在扭曲双层石墨烯和菱面体石墨烯多层中进行了详细预测。
AI.motivation: 在时间反演对称性破缺的轨道磁体中，AHE是常用的探测手段，但存在局限性。作者希望寻找一种替代探测谷极化的方法，尤其在AHE为零时仍能有效工作。
AI.method: 通过分类分析多层结构中的层间隧穿效应，结合自洽Hartree-Fock计算和半经典输运计算，研究了扭曲双层石墨烯和菱面体石墨烯多层中的LMC行为。
AI.result: 在扭曲双层石墨烯中，LMC有限但AHE为零（除非衬底引入额外对称性破缺）；在菱面体石墨烯多层中，LMC和AHE均跟踪谷极化。LMC来源于层间隧穿引起的面内轨道矩和贝里曲率，占主导于自旋响应。
AI.conclusion: 奇数阶面内LMC是谷极化的有效探测手段，可在AHE为零时提供互补信息，对二维材料中的轨道磁态研究具有重要实验意义。

title: Fuzzy band structure of quantum dots by Bloch Orbital Expansion, unconventional insights into geometry-electronic structure relations
summary: The extension of ab-initio methods like density functional theory (DFT) to quantum dot (QD) geometries has enabled researchers to explore relationships between QD surface termination and electronic structure. However, fully utilizing the data from DFT requires novel classification methods for QD orbitals.
