Here, we identify relationships between QD geometry and electronic structure by transforming real-space QD orbitals into momentum-space using Bloch orbital expansion (BOE), yielding a fuzzy QD band structure. Comparing with bulk band structures, we show that truncated, unpassivated facets in III-V and II-VI QDs produce mid-gap orbitals derived from bulk surface orbitals; an identification challenging in real space. QDs with reconstructed facets, however, feature delocalized orbitals formed by superposition of bulk Bloch orbitals. Moreover, we prepare for the first time atomistic core/shell QD models and by the BOE expansion we can clearly identify the core/shell band alignment not possible in real space. These findings emphasize BOE as a vital tool for connecting computational and experimental insights in nanocrystal research.

AI.tldr: 本文利用布洛赫轨道展开（BOE）方法将量子点的实空间轨道转换到动量空间，从而识别量子点几何结构与电子结构之间的关系，并首次构建了原子级核/壳量子点模型，证明了BOE作为连接计算与实验洞察的关键工具的价值。
AI.motivation: 密度泛函理论（DFT）已扩展至量子点（QD）几何结构，能够探索QD表面终端与电子结构的关系，但充分利用DFT数据需要新颖的QD轨道分类方法。
AI.method: 通过布洛赫轨道展开（BOE）将实空间QD轨道转换到动量空间，得到模糊的QD能带结构，并与体相能带结构进行比较。
AI.result: 截断且未钝化的III-V和II-VI族QD小面产生源于体相表面轨道的带隙中间轨道；重构小面的QD具有由体相布洛赫轨道叠加形成的离域轨道；首次制备的原子级核/壳QD模型可通过BOE清晰识别核/壳能带对齐。
AI.conclusion: BOE方法是从计算与实验角度连接纳米晶研究的重要工具。

title: Brownian motion: non-equilibrium states from equilibrium trajectories -- recovering hydrodynamic regimes from prepared displacement measurements
summary: Owing to the Chapman-Kolmogorov equation for Markovian dynamics,any equilibrium trajectory of a Brownian particle in a solvent fluid can be viewed as the superposition of an uncountable number of non-equilibrium states. This property permits the unraveling of fine details of fluid-particle interactions at microscales defined by its non-equilibrium properties from the analysis of a single Brownian trajectory and to connect them to the hydrodynamics of the solvent fluid, simply considering the lower-order (second) moments of particle position in trapped conditions. In this way, the acceleration due to thermal-hydrodynamic fluctuational forces is isolated from the other factors and the short-time displacement statistics is completely determined by the correlation properties of the fluctuational thermal-hydrodynamic force. This approach not only confirms the $t^{5/2}$-law obtained by Boynewicz et al. (2026), related to fluid inertial effects, but indicates that this scaling may be superseded by a $t^4$-scaling at very short times once the correlated nature of the stochastic forcings is taken into account. The latter result is related to the regularity properties of particle velocity realizations.

AI.tldr: 本文利用Chapman-Kolmogorov方程将布朗粒子的平衡轨迹分解为无数非平衡态的叠加，通过分析单条布朗轨迹的低阶矩揭示流体-粒子相互作用的微观细节，并发现短时位移统计遵循t^{5/2}定律（与流体惯性效应相关），而在极短时间尺度上由于随机力相关性的影响，该标度律可能被t^4标度所取代。
AI.motivation: 从单条布朗运动轨迹中提取流体-粒子相互作用的微观细节，并建立非平衡特性与溶剂流体水动力学之间的联系。
AI.method: 利用Chapman-Kolmogorov方程将平衡轨迹分解为无穷多个非平衡态的叠加，通过分析低阶矩（二阶矩）隔离热-水动力学涨落力引起的加速度，从而确定短时位移统计。
AI.result: 验证了Boynewicz等人(2026)提出的t^{5/2}定律（流体惯性效应），并发现极短时间尺度上考虑随机力相关性后，该标度可能被t^4标度取代。
AI.conclusion: 极短时间尺度上随机力的相关性改变了位移统计的标度律，该结果与粒子速度实现的正则性性质有关。

title: In-situ correlative SEM/KPFM for semiconductor devices and 2D heterostructures
summary: Correlative nanoscale surface characterization benefits from simultaneously measuring electronic and structural properties in the same environment, a capability that is essential for modern-day materials science and semiconductor failure analysis. In-situ AFM-SEM measurements facilitated by self-sensing cantilevers offer great potential here; however, they are limited due to their inherent capacitive crosstalk. Here, we demonstrate for the first time the in-situ implementation of single-pass heterodyne Kelvin probe force microscopy inside a scanning electron microscope, using piezo-resistive cantilevers. We overcome the capacitive crosstalk prevalent in piezo-resistive cantilevers by demodulating excitation and detection to simultaneously map surface topography and contact potential difference for correlation with compositional analysis. We systematically compare different operational modes of this heterodyne technique, elucidating their spatial resolution, signal sensitivity, and signal-to-noise ratio. The integrated approach yields exceptional signal quality and reveals how electron beam scan parameters can directly influence surface potential contrast. We demonstrate this correlative analysis workflow on two-dimensional heterostructures and semiconductor circuits. This work establishes a robust and versatile correlative imaging mode for in-situ Kelvin force and topography imaging inside a scanning electron microscope for next-generation semiconductor device analysis and materials science.

AI.tldr: 本文首次在扫描电镜内实现了基于自感悬臂的单程外差开尔文探针力显微镜，克服了压阻悬臂的电容串扰问题，实现了表面形貌与接触电势差的同步测量，并成功应用于二维异质结构和半导体电路分析。
AI.motivation: 现代材料科学和半导体失效分析需要同时在相同环境下测量电子和结构特性，但现有的原位AFM-SEM方法受限于自感悬臂的电容串扰问题。
AI.method: 采用压阻悬臂实现单程外差开尔文探针力显微镜（heterodyne KPFM），通过解调激励和检测来克服电容串扰，同步绘制表面形貌和接触电势差。
AI.result: 首次实现了SEM内的原位单程外差KPFM，系统比较了不同操作模式的空间分辨率、信号灵敏度和信噪比，揭示了电子束扫描参数对表面电势对比度的直接影响。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了一种鲁棒且通用的原位相关成像模式，适用于下一代半导体器件分析和材料科学。

title: Charge Transfer from Perovskite Quantum Dots to Multifunctional Ligands with Tethered Molecular Species
summary: Perovskite quantum dots (pQDs) are promising materials for optoelectronic and photocatalytic applications due to their unique optical properties. To enhance charge carrier extraction or injection donor/acceptor molecules can be tethered to the pQD. These molecules must strongly bind to the ionic surfaces of pQDs without compromising colloidal stability. These we achieve by using multifunctional ligands containing a quaternary ammonium binding group for strong pQDs surface attachment, a long tail group for colloidal stability, and a functional group near the pQD surface. Such pQDs with ferrocene-functionalized ligands show fast photoexcited hole transfer with near-unity efficiency. Density functional theory calculations reveal how ferrocene's molecular structure reorganizes following hole transfer, affecting its charge separation efficiency. This approach can also be extended to in photoexcited electron and energy transfer processes with pQDs. Therefore, this strategy offers a blueprint for creating efficient QD-molecular hybrids for applications like photocatalysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多功能配体策略，通过在钙钛矿量子点表面连接含有季铵基团、长尾基团和功能基团的配体，实现了高效的电荷转移，特别是以二茂铁为例实现了近100%的空穴转移效率，为量子点-分子杂化材料的设计提供了蓝图。
AI.motivation: 钙钛矿量子点在光电和光催化领域有巨大潜力，但如何在不影响胶体稳定性的前提下，将供体/受体分子牢固连接到其离子表面并实现高效电荷转移，是当前面临的关键挑战。
AI.method: 设计了一种多功能的配体，包含三个关键部分：季铵基团（强结合到钙钛矿量子点表面）、长尾基团（维持胶体稳定性）、以及靠近量子点表面的功能基团（实现电荷转移）。以二茂铁功能化配体为例，结合密度泛函理论计算分析分子结构重组对电荷分离效率的影响。
AI.result: 二茂铁功能化的钙钛矿量子点实现了近100%的光激发空穴转移效率；DFT计算揭示了二茂铁在空穴转移后分子结构发生重组，这一过程影响了电荷分离效率。
AI.conclusion: 该多功能配体策略不仅适用于空穴转移，还可扩展至光激发电子和能量转移过程，为构建高效量子点-分子杂化体系（如光催化应用）提供了设计蓝图。

title: The fractal dimension of Brownian dynamics in liquids
summary: The classical Einstein-Langevin theory of Brownian motion assumes a memoryless thermal bath, establishing a universal fractal dimension of $d_v = 3/2$ for the velocity fluctuations of a particle. In this Letter, we demonstrate experimentally and theoretically that fluid-inertial memory effects fundamentally redefine the fractal scaling of these fluctuations. In analyzing highly resolved measurements of Brownian microspheres in liquids, we show that the non-Markovian hydrodynamic thermal noise establishes a distinct velocity fractal dimension of $d_v = 7/4$. Coupled with theoretical analysis of non-equilibrium short-time dynamics and the initial scaling of the velocity autocorrelation function, this result establishes the non-equilibrium universality class of Brownian motion in fluid media possessing a finite non-vanishing density.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过实验和理论证明，流体惯性记忆效应将布朗运动速度波动的分形维度从经典的d_v=3/2改变为d_v=7/4，建立了流体介质中布朗运动的非平衡普适类。
AI.motivation: 经典爱因斯坦-朗之万理论假设无记忆热浴，但实际流体具有惯性记忆效应，作者希望揭示这种非马尔可夫效应对布朗运动速度涨落分形标度的影响。
AI.method: 对液体中布朗微球进行高分辨率测量，结合非平衡短时动力学和速度自相关函数初始标度的理论分析。
AI.result: 发现非马尔可夫流体惯性热噪声导致速度分形维度为d_v=7/4，不同于经典理论预测的d_v=3/2。
AI.conclusion: 该结果确立了具有有限非零密度的流体介质中布朗运动的非平衡普适类。

title: Acoustic spin resonance in polariton condensates
summary: We theoretically investigate acoustic spin resonance in a spatially homogeneous spinor polariton condensate. A longitudinal acoustic wave generates a time-periodic strain-induced effective magnetic field acting on the condensate pseudospin. When this field is transverse to the static in-plane linear-polarization splitting, it resonantly drives polarization oscillations. We show that spin-dependent interactions shift the resonance and produce nonlinear line shapes, while gain, reservoir dynamics, and spin relaxation make the response dissipative and history-dependent, producing amplitude hysteresis. In the presence of lifetime anisotropy, the condensate can develop a bifurcated stationary state with finite circular polarization, and a resonant acoustic drive can switch between the corresponding out-of-plane branches. A Zeeman splitting provides an additional conservative knob for tuning the resonance frequency. Our results identify coherent acoustic driving as a route to resonant, nonlinear, and switchable control of polariton pseudospin dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文理论研究了空间均匀自旋极化激元凝聚体中声学自旋共振现象。纵波声场产生时变应变有效磁场，与静态面内线偏振分裂正交时驱动偏振振荡。自旋依赖相互作用导致共振频移和非线性线型；增益、库动力学和自旋弛豫使响应具有耗散性和历史依赖性，产生振幅滞后。寿命各向异性下凝聚体可出现分岔稳态（有限圆偏振），共振声驱动可在不同面外分支间切换。塞曼分裂可调谐共振频率。
AI.motivation: 探索利用相干声学驱动实现对极化激元赝自旋动力学的共振、非线性及可切换控制的新机制。
AI.method: 对空间均匀自旋极化激元凝聚体进行理论分析，考虑声致应变有效磁场、自旋依赖相互作用、增益-库动力学、自旋弛豫及寿命各向异性等效应。
AI.result: 发现自旋相互作用导致共振非线性；耗散与历史依赖性产生振幅滞后；寿命各向异性下出现分岔稳态及声驱动切换；塞曼分裂提供额外调谐自由度。
AI.conclusion: 相干声学驱动是实现极化激元赝自旋共振、非线性与可切换控制的有效途径。

title: Long-range magnetic ordering and structural phase transition in disordered high-entropy spinel chromites
summary: High-entropy spinel oxides provide an excellent platform for investigating entropy-stabilized correlated systems with strong configurational disorder. In this work, we systematically study the temperature evolution of the structural and magnetic properties of Cr-based high-entropy spinels with compositions $(Mn_{0.2}Co_{0.2}Ni_{0.2}Cu_{0.2}Zn_{0.2})Cr_2O_4$ and $(Mg_{0.2}Co_{0.2}Ni_{0.2}Cu_{0.2}Zn_{0.2})Cr_2O_4$. Our results reveal that both systems crystallize in cubic structure with space group \textit{$Fd\overline{3}m$} at room temperature. Each system undergoes antiferromagnetic ordering below the Néel temperatures $ T_N$ = 49 K and 35 K, respectively. Neutron diffraction measurements confirm the emergence of long-range magnetic order with spiral spin arrangement. Both systems exhibit a structural phase transition from cubic \textit{$Fd\overline{3}m$} to orthorhombic \textit{Fddd} symmetry at approximately 55 K and 85 K, respectively. Notably, despite the significant chemical disorder at the A site, both systems undergo transitions analogous to those observed in low entropy spinel systems. This behavior suggests that high configurational entropy may promote global structural stabilization despite local chemical disorder, thereby preserving long-range orderings and the characteristic symmetry-breaking transitions of the pristine spinel systems.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了两种Cr基高熵尖晶石氧化物的结构和磁性随温度的变化，发现它们在低温下出现反铁磁有序和螺旋自旋排列，并经历从立方到正交的结构相变。尽管A位存在显著化学无序，它们仍保持与低熵尖晶石类似的相变行为，表明高构型熵可能促进全局结构稳定，从而保留长程有序和对称性破缺转变。
AI.motivation: 高熵尖晶石氧化物为研究具有强构型无序的熵稳定关联系统提供了优秀平台，但目前对其磁性和结构相变行为的理解尚不充分。
AI.method: 系统研究了两种Cr基高熵尖晶石(Mn,Co,Ni,Cu,Zn)Cr₂O₄和(Mg,Co,Ni,Cu,Zn)Cr₂O₄的变温结构与磁性，使用中子衍射等方法确认长程磁有序和自旋构型。
AI.result: 两种体系在室温下均为立方Fd-3m结构，分别在T_N=49 K和35 K发生反铁磁有序，具有螺旋自旋排列；并在约55 K和85 K经历从立方Fd-3m到正交Fddd的结构相变。
AI.conclusion: 高构型熵可能促进全局结构稳定，尽管存在局部化学无序，但仍能保留长程有序和与低熵尖晶石类似的对称性破缺相变。

title: Causation-guided mechanism identification and interpretable reduced-order modeling of damage-driving grain-boundary stress in creep
summary: Grain-boundary (GB) local stress is central to the initiation and evolution of long-term creep damage in polycrystalline superalloys. Owing to the high-dimensional nonlinear relationships between the GB stress response and multiple crystallographic, microstructural, and micromechanical characteristics, it remains challenging to identify the key characteristics governing GB stress and to elucidate their mechanisms of influence. Dislocation-climb-affected crystal-plasticity finite-element simulations of minimal grain clusters are combined with an integrated causation-guided machine-learning framework, in which mechanics-informed descriptors are analyzed by causation entropy to identify governing mechanisms and then distilled into a reduced-order regression form for interpretable prediction of GB normal stress. Among 18 physically motivated characteristics, the GB inclination angle, the slip transmission, the climb-related Schmid-type indicator, and the elastic-modulus mismatch are found to be dominant, revealing the coupled roles of interfacial geometry, crystallographic compatibility, creep stress relaxation, and micromechanical contrast. The identified characteristics hierarchy and functional representation remain effective under multiaxial loading and can be extended to tricrystal systems through physically interpretable nonlocal augmentation when a purely local description becomes insufficient, demonstrating strong physical consistency and robust generalizability across physical conditions. The extracted candidate functions also improve surrogate-model performance across multiple machine-learning model classes, providing supporting evidence for the physical relevance and efficiency of the identified representation. The proposed methods demonstrate strong potential for the development of interpretable machine-learning models and for the study of microscale nonlocal damage.

AI.tldr: 本研究结合位错攀移影响的晶体塑性有限元模拟与因果引导的机器学习框架，从18个物理特征中识别出晶界倾角、滑移传递、攀移相关Schmid指标和弹性模量失配是支配多晶高温合金晶界正应力的关键因素，揭示了界面几何、晶体学兼容性、蠕变应力松弛和微力学对比的耦合作用，并通过可解释的非局部增强方法推广到三晶系统，展现了强物理一致性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 晶界局部应力是高温合金长期蠕变损伤的核心驱动因素，但由于晶界应力响应与多重晶体学、微观结构和微力学特征之间存在高维非线性关系，识别支配晶界应力的关键特征并阐明其影响机制面临巨大挑战。
AI.method: 采用位错攀移影响的晶体塑性有限元模拟生成最小晶粒簇数据，结合因果引导的机器学习框架：首先通过因果熵分析力学信息描述子，识别支配机制；然后蒸馏为降阶回归形式，实现晶界法向应力的可解释预测；最后通过物理可解释的非局部增强扩展到三晶系统。
AI.result: 从18个物理特征中识别出4个主导因素：晶界倾角、滑移传递、攀移相关Schmid指标和弹性模量失配；该特征层级和函数表示在多轴加载下有效，并可扩展到三晶系统；提取的候选函数在不同ML模型类中提升替代模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法为开发可解释机器学习模型和研究微尺度非局部损伤展现出强潜力，具有强物理一致性和跨物理条件的鲁棒泛化能力。

title: Thermal conductivity of seifertite and pyrite-type SiO$_2$: A comparative study
summary: Thermal conductivity is a fundamental material property that plays a crucial role in understanding the dynamics and evolution of planetary interiors. Despite its importance, the thermal conductivity of seifertite and pyrite-type SiO$_2$ remains unknown. Here, we calculate the lattice thermal conductivities of seifertite and pyrite-type SiO$_2$ using the Green-Kubo method based on molecular dynamics (MD) simulations driven by two machine learning potentials (MLPs) constructed from the SCAN and PBEsol exchange-correlation functionals, with $\textit{ab initio}$-level accuracy. To demonstrate our methodology, we also compute thermal conductivities using the phonon quasiparticle approach for comparison. Overall, the Green-Kubo method predicts up to 119 % higher thermal conductivity with a temperature dependence close to $T^{-1}$, as it fully captures diffusion-like phonons at high temperatures that are missed by the phonon quasiparticle approach. The 19 % reduction in thermal conductivity across the phase transition from seifertite to the pyrite-type phase suggests the potential formation of a thermally insulating layer in the mantle of super-Earths.

AI.tldr: 本文利用基于机器学习的分子动力学模拟，首次计算了seifertite和pyrite-type SiO₂的晶格热导率，发现Green-Kubo方法比声子准粒子方法预测的热导率高出119%，且从seifertite到pyrite-type的相变导致热导率降低19%，暗示超地球地幔中可能存在绝热层。
AI.motivation: 热导率是理解行星内部动力学和演化的关键材料属性，但seifertite和pyrite-type SiO₂的热导率此前未知，亟需填补这一空白。
AI.method: 采用两种机器学习势（基于SCAN和PBEsol泛函）驱动的分子动力学模拟，通过Green-Kubo方法计算晶格热导率，并与声子准粒子方法对比验证。
AI.result: Green-Kubo方法预测的热导率比声子准粒子方法高出119%，温度依赖性接近T⁻¹；seifertite到pyrite-type相变导致热导率降低19%。
AI.conclusion: Green-Kubo方法能更全面捕获高温下扩散型声子贡献；热导率在相变中的显著降低表明超地球地幔中可能形成热绝缘层，影响行星内部热演化。

title: Rapid Atmospheric Vapor Deposition of H:In2O3 Transparent Conducting Oxide Thin Films
summary: Transparent conducting oxides (TCOs) are essential for the optoelectronics industry, but there is a critical gap in cost-effective methods to rapidly deposit low sheet resistance, high transmittance films without damaging delicate materials, including emerging soft semiconductors like metal-halide perovskites. In this work, atmospheric pressure chemical vapor deposition (AP-CVD) is used to synthesise H:In2O3 films with 7.20+/-0.01 Ohm/sq sheet resistance (0.50+/-0.06 mOhm.cm resistivity) and transmittance up to 89% in the near-infrared (NIR), surpassing commercial sputter-deposited indium tin oxide. The growth rate is 40x higher than atomic layer deposition (ALD), and the AP-CVD films are fully processed under atmospheric conditions at only 140 C. Comparison of secondary ion mass spectrometry and time-of-flight elastic recoil detection analysis with changes in carrier concentration indicate that H dopants are introduced from the water oxidant. There is an increase in mobility form 40+/-10 cm2/Vs to 160+/-30 cm2/Vs when changing from O2 to H2O as the oxidant, which is attributed to H dopants passivating oxygen vacancies that act as carrier scattering centers. This work establishes AP-CVD as a promising method for manufacturing high figure-of-merit TCOs in a rapid, scalable and cost-effective manner, using mild growth conditions compatible with thermally-sensitive materials.

AI.tldr: 本文采用常压化学气相沉积（AP-CVD）在140°C温和条件下快速制备H:In₂O₃透明导电氧化物薄膜，实现了7.20 Ohm/sq的低薄层电阻、89%的近红外透光率和160 cm²/Vs的高载流子迁移率，沉积速率比原子层沉积快40倍，且性能超越商业溅射ITO，为热敏材料（如钙钛矿）提供了一种快速、可扩展、低成本的TCO制备方案。
AI.motivation: 透明导电氧化物（TCO）对于光电子产业至关重要，但目前缺乏一种低成本、快速沉积低薄层电阻、高透光率薄膜的方法，且该方法不能损害包括金属卤化物钙钛矿在内的新兴软半导体材料。
AI.method: 采用常压化学气相沉积（AP-CVD）在140°C、大气环境下合成H:In₂O₃薄膜，以H₂O作为氧化剂引入氢掺杂，并通过二次离子质谱（SIMS）和飞行时间弹性反冲检测分析（TOF-ERDA）表征掺杂机制。
AI.result: 制备的H:In₂O₃薄膜薄层电阻为7.20±0.01 Ohm/sq，电阻率0.50±0.06 mOhm·cm，近红外透光率高达89%，沉积速率比原子层沉积（ALD）快40倍。使用H₂O代替O₂作为氧化剂使载流子迁移率从40±10 cm²/Vs提升至160±30 cm²/Vs，归因于氢掺杂钝化了作为载流子散射中心的氧空位。
AI.conclusion: AP-CVD是一种快速、可扩展、低成本且有前景的TCO制备方法，其温和的生长条件与热敏材料兼容，适用于高性能透明导电氧化物的工业化生产。

title: Bridging Atomistic Simulation and Experimental Processing Timescales with Goal-Directed Deep Reinforcement Learning
summary: Atomic-scale modeling has advanced rapidly through integration of machine learning, yet a key bottleneck remains. Even with an accurate potential energy surface and a clear target material, we still lack a practical atomistic dynamics framework that can simulate how materials form under realistic synthesis and processing conditions. Many processing transformations are governed by rare events in non-idealized evolving environments, while direct molecular dynamics is limited by femtosecond timesteps and short accessible trajectories. Existing acceleration methods often require prior mechanistic knowledge, including reaction coordinates, collective variables, event tables, or pathway guesses, which is rarely available in real experiments. Here we present an E(3)-equivariant deep reinforcement learning framework that enables goal-directed pathway discovery without hand-crafted reaction coordinates. The framework introduces a complementary operating mode for atomistic simulation in which realistic, non-idealized environments can be addressed directly while retaining kinetic plausibility through barrier-aware rewards. As a challenging benchmark, we target silicon dry oxidation, where rare-event pathways in amorphous SiO2 are effectively inaccessible to conventional atomistic methods. We treat an O2 molecule as an agent that performs continuous rigid-body translations and rotations in a Si/a-SiO2 environment. The agent is trained with an episode-level objective that rewards verified O2 dissociation while preferring low effective activation barriers. We demonstrate that the learned policy discovers kinetically favorable O2 diffusion and dissociation pathways in a disordered Si/a-SiO2 environment, progressively improving success rate while reducing effective activation barriers over training. We also discuss how the approach can be generalized to other processing and synthesis problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种E(3)等变深度强化学习框架，无需手工设计反应坐标，即可在非理想化环境中发现稀有事件路径，并以硅干氧化为例验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有原子模拟方法受限于飞秒级时间步长和短轨迹，加速方法又需要预先知道反应坐标、集体变量等先验机制知识，而这些在实际实验中往往是未知的。
AI.method: 提出E(3)等变深度强化学习框架，将O2分子视为智能体，在Si/a-SiO2环境中执行连续刚体平移和旋转；通过基于能垒感知的奖励函数和回合级目标进行训练，奖励O2解离并偏好低有效激活能垒。
AI.result: 学习到的策略能够在无序Si/a-SiO2环境中发现动力学上有利的O2扩散和解离路径，训练过程中成功率和有效激活能垒均逐步改善。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为原子模拟提供了一种新的互补操作模式，可直接处理非理想化环境并保持动力学合理性，可推广至其他材料合成与加工问题。

title: Universal Magnetic Structure Prediction from Atomic Coordinates with Near-Experimental Accuracy
summary: Magnetic order is a fundamental property of materials, governing collective behavior and enabling a broad range of functionalities. Yet magnetic structure remains difficult to determine: experiments are costly and specialized, while first-principles methods often struggle with the noncollinear and incommensurate orders found in real materials. Here we introduce magnetic structure network (MSN), an E(3) equivariant graph neural network that predicts both collinear and non-collinear magnetic structures directly from atomic crystal structures, trained directly on experimentally determined structures from MAGNDATA. By proposing the primitive modulated structure representation (PMSR), we are able to encode commensurate and incommensurate structures in a unified way without symmetry assumptions. The model achieves strong performance across all modulation components and reconstructs experimental magnetic structures with high fidelity. Our approach provides a scalable framework for rapid magnetic structure prediction and opens a route to data-driven discovery of magnetic materials.

AI.tldr: 本文提出磁结构网络（MSN），一种E(3)等变图神经网络，可直接从原子晶体结构预测共线和非共线磁结构，通过原始调制结构表示（PMSR）统一编码公度和非公度结构，在MAGNDATA数据集上实现高保真度重建。
AI.motivation: 磁结构是材料的基本属性，但实验测定成本高、专业性强，第一性原理方法处理实际材料中的非共线和无公度磁序时存在困难，亟需高效预测方法。
AI.method: 提出MSN（E(3)等变图神经网络）和PMSR（原始调制结构表示），PMSR统一编码公度/非公度磁结构无需对称性假设，直接以原子晶体结构为输入预测磁结构。
AI.result: 在MAGNDATA实验数据上训练，模型在所有调制组件上表现优异，高保真度重建实验磁结构。
AI.conclusion: 提供可扩展的快速磁结构预测框架，开辟数据驱动的磁性材料发现新途径。
